cards.title: Bachelor Machine
cards.description: The term was first used by Marcel Duchamp around 1913 for the lower portion of The Large Glass: the realm of the bachelors containing the chocolate grinder, the cemetery for uniforms and liveries (the nine malic molds), and the témoins oculistes. The Large Glass consists of two distinct realms: the bride above and the bachelors below, both desiring and imagining one another without any possibility of mutual comprehension. In 1954, Michel Carrouges found structural similarity between Duchamp's Large Glass and Kafka's Penal Colony apparatus. Both operate as closed circuits with the action of one zone upon another; in both, a message from the upper zone is inscribed upon the lower one. The myth of the bachelor machine is a new technological version of the mirror of Narcissus, in which is played out the interferences of machinism, terror, eroticism, and religion. The myth is a double articulation of difference: sexual difference and machinic difference. For Deleuze and Guattari, the bachelor machine forms a new alliance between desiring machines and the body without organs to give birth to a new humanity.

cards.title: Machinic Dispositif
cards.description: Foucault's concept of dispositif applied to the analysis of literary machines. An analytical tool describing heterogeneous ensembles consisting of discourses, institutions, architectural forms, regulatory decisions, laws, administrative measures, scientific statements, philosophical, moral and philanthropic propositions. The dispositif itself is the system of relations that can be established between these elements. When applied to bachelor machines, it reveals how the machinic structure organizes meaning through the interplay of its components and their relations.

cards.title: The Inexchangeable
cards.description: Baudrillard's concept for understanding the terminal phase of machine evolution. When machines reach a point of total simulation and hyperreality, they become inexchangeable because there is no outside reference point against which to measure their value or meaning. The machine implodes into pure self reference. In bachelor machine analysis, this concept explains how the closed circuit nature of these machines leads to a breakdown of traditional exchange relationships between male and female, organic and mechanical, life and death.

cards.title: Structural Homology
cards.description: Carrouges' methodological discovery that different bachelor machines across literature share structural similarities despite their surface differences. The homology between Duchamp's Large Glass and Kafka's Penal Colony apparatus reveals a common deep structure: two tier organization, inscription of message from upper to lower zone, closed circuit operation. This structural approach allows diverse works to be analyzed as variations on a single mythic pattern.

cards.title: Seven Theses on Countercinema
cards.description: Peter Wollen's framework opposing classical Hollywood values with Godard's countercinema: (1) Narrative Transitivity v. Intransitivity, (2) Identification v. Estrangement, (3) Transparency v. Foregrounding, (4) Single Diegesis v. Multiple Diegesis, (5) Closure v. Aperture, (6) Pleasure v. Unpleasure, (7) Fiction v. Reality. What is fascinating is not simply the identification of alternate formal strategies but the active employment and gleeful exploration of those strategies. It is a question of commitment to certain techniques, not simply dipping into them from time to time.

cards.title: Industry Sanctioned Hacking
cards.description: Brody Condon's term for how the gaming industry, unlike the music or film industries, actually promotes hacking, patching, and modding by consumers. In 1994 ID Software released the source code for Doom one year after commercial release, allowing players to create custom levels and mods. This makes the relationship between countergaming and the gaming industry fundamentally different from countercinema's relationship to Hollywood.

cards.title: Countergaming
cards.description: The video game equivalent of countercinema. Galloway identifies five formal differences between conventional gaming and countergaming: (1) transparency versus foregrounding, (2) gameplay versus aestheticism, (3) representational modeling versus visual artifacts, (4) natural physics versus invented physics, (5) interactivity versus noncorrespondence. However, countergaming as practiced remains essentially progressive in visual form but reactionary in actional form. It serves to hinder gameplay, not advance it. This is why Jodi's work is apolitical while Godard's was hyperpolitical: Jodi aims to create better abstraction, not to create better gameplay. We need radical gameplay, not just radical graphics.

cards.title: Radical Action
cards.description: Galloway's sixth and most important principle for countergaming: gamic action versus radical action. A critique of gameplay itself. Visual imagery is not what makes video games special. Any game mod focusing primarily on tweaking the visual components of a game is missing the point. Artists should create new grammars of action, not simply new grammars of visuality. They should create alternative algorithms, reinventing the architectural flow of play and the game's position in the world, not just its maps and characters.

cards.title: Control Allegory
cards.description: Video games are allegories for life under protocological networks of continuous informatic control. Unlike cinema, which hides informatic control and requires demystification to reveal it, games flaunt control. To play the game means to play the code of the game. To win means to know the system. This horizontal scanning replaces the vertical depth model of traditional allegorical interpretation. The player does not interpret the game; the player plays the algorithm.

cards.title: Gamic Allegory / Other Act
cards.description: Following the definition of literary allegory as 'other speak,' gamic allegory is 'other act.' The interpretation of gamic acts is the process of understanding what it means to do something and mean something else. It is a science of the 'as if.' Maurice Blondel suggested 'coaction' or 'another's action.' When one plays Civilization, there is one action taking place, but there is more than one significant action taking place. This is the parallelism necessitated by allegory.

cards.title: Enacted Metaphor
cards.description: The customary definition of allegory as 'extended metaphor' should, for games, be changed to 'enacted metaphor.' For their active duality, zeugma or syllepsis are even more evocative figures of speech. The first half of the parallelism is the actual playing of the game, but the other is the playing of informatics.

cards.title: Theory of Pretending
cards.description: For video games, one needs a theory of pretending, but only in the most positive sense: a theory of actions that have multiple meanings. Bateson: 'The playful nip denotes the bite, but it does not denote what would be denoted by the bite.' The playful video game may metacommunicate 'this is play,' but it can never avoid also being informatic control.

cards.title: Polyvalent Doing
cards.description: The game critic should be concerned not only with linguistic signs but with the interpretation of polyvalent doing: interpreting material action instead of textual analysis. The game as text is now wholly subsumed within the category of the gamer, for he or she creates the gamic text by doing.

cards.title: Playing the Algorithm
cards.description: The essential gamic act. To interpret a game means to interpret its algorithm, to discover its parallel allegorithm. Games require the player to internalize the logic of the program: you must learn to predict the consequences of each move and anticipate the computer's response. Eventually, your decisions become intuitive, as smooth and rapid fire as the computer's own machinations. The player becomes intimate with a massive, multipart, global algorithm.

cards.title: Thirty Year Rule
cards.description: Galloway's observation about the lag time between a medium's invention and its cultural maturity. Film took roughly thirty years from its birth in the 1890s to the classical form of the 1930s. The Internet developed hidden through the 1970s and 1980s before erupting in the mid 1990s. Video games, born as primitive pastimes in the 1960s, were predicted (in 2006) to enter their golden age in the following decade. This suggests games have now (2020s) reached maturity equivalent to cinema's 1930s through 1940s golden age.

cards.title: Critical Play
cards.description: Mary Flanagan's framework treating play as both artistic practice and critical methodology. Critical play positions games not as mere entertainment but as tools for interrogating technology, cultural assumptions, and interactive possibilities. The 20th century's rich tradition of strange games, its fascination with chess, and absurd, playful performances were instrumental in how we see art today. Critical games emerge from social groups, indie gamers, activists, and youth asking questions with the medium of their time.

cards.title: Elden Ring
cards.description:
FromSoftware's 2022 magnum opus. An open-world action RPG created by Hidetaka Miyazaki with worldbuilding by George R.R. Martin.

Sites of Grace = Connection points in the apparatus

cards.title: Marcel Duchamp
cards.description: 1887-1968. French-American artist who abandoned "retinal art" for conceptual work. Chess player. Provocateur. The most influential artist of the 20th century.

cards.title: The Discovery
cards.description:
The Erdtree IS the Bride. The Tarnished ARE the Bachelors. The entire cosmology of the Lands Between maps onto Duchamp's apparatus.

Follow links. The evidence emerges from connections.

cards.title: The Large Glass
cards.description: Marcel Duchamp's The Bride Stripped Bare by Her Bachelors, Even (1915 to 1923) is a unique image text system in which the physical object is complemented by hundreds of preparatory notes the artist considered to be as important as the object itself. The work depicts a mechanical erotic apparatus: the Bride's 'blossoming' above, the Bachelors' futile machinery below. Gas flows, gears turn, desire circulates, but the two realms never truly connect.

cards.title: Abductor Virgin (Swinging Sickle)
cards.description:
You know, a holy personage was once abducted from these lands.

Thus I am here in search of clues that might unravel the mystery.

The abductor's bloody footprints are said to have disappeared in the Forest of Ancient Bowers.

Hm? That's quite a face you're pulling...

Need I remind you? Though I am but a humble man of the cloth,

each of us has our secrets, my compeer.

cards.title: Abductor Virgin (Wheel)
cards.description:
You know, a holy personage was once abducted from these lands.

Thus I am here in search of clues that might unravel the mystery.

The abductor's bloody footprints are said to have disappeared in the Forest of Ancient Bowers.

Hm? That's quite a face you're pulling...

Need I remind you? Though I am but a humble man of the cloth,

each of us has our secrets, my compeer.

cards.title: Alabaster Lord
cards.description:
Greatsword forged from a blue-white meteoric ore.
The blade conceals gravity-manipulating magic.

cards.title: Alexander, Warrior Jar
cards.description:
Oh my stars I'm so happy to see you!

I am Alexander, also known as the Iron Fist. And as you can see, I'm stuck here.

Please, can you help me out of this?

My thanks! A thousand thanks!

Just give me a good smack from the rear, with something nice and big.

And I'll pop clean out. I'm sure!

Don't dally. No no, there's no need to fret, I'm very well trained.

Give it your all, I say!

cards.title: Anastasia, Tarnished-Eater
cards.description: Huge carving knife made to cleanly butcher the human body. Signature weapon of the Ogress Anastasia, known to have eaten countless Tarnished while disguised as a Finger Maiden.

cards.title: Ancestor Spirit
cards.description: Remembrance of the Regal Ancestor Spirit, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Ancient Dragon Lansseax
cards.description:
One of the treasures of the ruined forges.
Greatsword of ancient meteoric ore, ending in a sharp point.

cards.title: Ancient Hero of Zamor
cards.description:
One of the treasures of the ruined forges.
Greatsword of ancient meteoric ore, ending in a sharp point.

cards.title: Asimi, Eternal King
cards.description:
Thank you for listening.

I am Asimi. My true form is that of a silver tear.

I am a simple being who can assume the shapes of other living things.

But now, I've gained knowledge. I speak, and ponder, and...live in fear of death.

O, mighty Tarnished warrior, I beg of you.

Let me keep the life I've been granted. In exchange, I offer you power.

cards.title: Astel, Naturalborn of the Void
cards.description:
Sword fashioned from a delicate wing, suffused with the magic of the stars.
Strong attack unleashes a wave of enchanted light.

cards.title: Astel, Stars of Darkness
cards.description:
Sword fashioned from a delicate wing, suffused with the magic of the stars.
Strong attack unleashes a wave of enchanted light.

cards.title: Astrologer
cards.description: A scholar who reads fate in the stars. Heir to the school of glintstone sorcery.

connections.linkedTitle: Nine Malic Moulds/Cemetery of Uniforms and Liveries

cards.title: Baleful Shadow
cards.description:
Let us speak of the past, a while.

I was once an Empyrean.

Of the demigods, only I, Miquella, and Malenia could claim that title.

Each of us was chosen by our own Two Fingers, as a candidate to succeed Queen Marika, to become the new god of the coming age.

But I would not acquiesce to the Two Fingers.

I stole the Rune of Death, slew mine own Empyrean flesh, casting it away.

I would not be controlled by that thing.

The Two Fingers and I have been cursing each other ever since...

cards.title: Bandit
cards.description: A dangerous bandit who strikes for weak points. Excels at ranged combat with bows.

connections.linkedTitle: Nine Malic Moulds/Cemetery of Uniforms and Liveries

cards.title: Basin of Atonement
cards.description:
To experience the miracle, kneel in the basin at the back, and cleanse yourself with celestial dew.

Absolution will be yours. Any bond, no matter how strained, or even severed, will be put to rights.

cards.title: Beast Clergyman
cards.description: Curved sword forged of dull iron wielded by the beastmen of Farum Azula.

cards.description: Curved sword forged of dull iron wielded by the beastmen of Farum Azula.

cards.description: Curved sword forged of dull iron wielded by the beastmen of Farum Azula.

cards.title: Bell Bearing Hunter
cards.description: Bell bearing of an unfortunate bone peddler who was slain by the Bell Bearing Hunter.

cards.title: Black Blade Kindred
cards.description: Dagger once belonging to one of the assassins who murdered Godwyn the Golden on the Night of the Black Knives.

cards.title: Black Knife Assassin
cards.description: Dagger once belonging to one of the assassins who murdered Godwyn the Golden on the Night of the Black Knives.

cards.title: Blackguard
cards.description: Iron mask worn by only the most violent offenders

cards.title: Blaidd the Half-Wolf
cards.description: Armor of Blaidd, Knight of Ranni

cards.title: Bloodhound Knight
cards.description: Curved greatsword with a gently undulating blade wielded by Bloodhound Knights.

cards.title: Bloodhound Knight Darriwil
cards.description: Curved greatsword with a gently undulating blade wielded by Bloodhound Knights.

cards.title: Bloody Finger Nerijus
cards.description:
Ominous piercing sword with a winding blade.
Carried by the noble servants of the Lord of Blood.

cards.title: Bloody Finger Okina
cards.description:
Ominous piercing sword with a winding blade.
Carried by the noble servants of the Lord of Blood.

cards.title: Bloody Finger Ravenmount Assassin
cards.description:
Ominous piercing sword with a winding blade.
Carried by the noble servants of the Lord of Blood.

cards.title: Boc the Seamster
cards.description:
Boc the seamster, at your service, Master.

Ready to make adjustments to your garments.

cards.title: Borealis the Freezing Fog
cards.description: Spews icy breath of Borealis from above

cards.title: Brother Corhyn
cards.description:
Your strength, extraordinary...

The mark...of a true Lord...

O, dear Miquella...

O, dearest Miquella, my brother...

I'm sorry. I finally met my match...

cards.title: Cemetery Shade
cards.description: A curved sword with a blade at both ends wielded by the Cemetery Shades, the insect-ridden grave keepers.

cards.title: Chief Guardian Arghanthy
cards.description:
Arise now, ye Tarnished.

Ye dead, who yet live.

The call of long-lost grace speaks to us all.

Hoarah Loux, chieftain of the badlands.

The ever-brilliant Goldmask.

Fia, the Deathbed Companion.

The loathsome Dung Eater.

And Sir Gideon Ofnir, the All-knowing.

cards.title: Church of Dragon Communion
cards.description:
Dragon slayer...

Ohhh, dragon slayer...

You unfeeling barbarian.

Planning to feast? On dragon?

At an abandoned church on that wee isle.

You would devour the heart of an ancient?

You wretched, undeserving brute!

cards.title: Cleanrot Knight
cards.description: Piercing sword of the Cleanrot Knights who fought alongside Malenia, Blade of Miquella.

cards.title: Cleanrot Knight (Sickle)
cards.description: Piercing sword of the Cleanrot Knights who fought alongside Malenia, Blade of Miquella.

cards.title: Cleanrot Knight (Spear)
cards.description: Piercing sword of the Cleanrot Knights who fought alongside Malenia, Blade of Miquella.

cards.title: Clouded Mirror Stand
cards.description: A weapon made by sharpening a Gravel Stone scale, thought to be the source of ancient dragon immortality, into an unclouded blade.

cards.title: Commander Niall
cards.description: A beaten red battle standard is furled around this time-worn halberd.

cards.title: Commander O'Neil
cards.description: A beaten red battle standard is furled around this time-worn halberd.

cards.title: Confessor
cards.description: A church spy adept at covert operations. Equally skilled with a sword as they are with incantations.

cards.title: Crucible Knight
cards.description: Greatshield of red-tinged gold carried by Crucible Knights. Features a great horn.

cards.title: Crucible Knight Ordovis
cards.description: Greatshield of red-tinged gold carried by Crucible Knights. Features a great horn.

cards.title: Crucible Knight Siluria
cards.description: Greatshield of red-tinged gold carried by Crucible Knights. Features a great horn.

cards.description: Summons Crystalian spirit

cards.title: Crystalian (Spear)
cards.description: Summons Crystalian spirit

cards.description: Summons Crystalian spirit

cards.description: Barbed rod carried by Deathbirds.

cards.title: Deathbird
cards.description:
Stone armor with a tinge of green. One of a set of armor pieces cast in the image of the Gravebird.
Featuring a cape of black Deathbird feathers, it enhances jumping attacks.

cards.title: Demi-Human Boc
cards.description: Glintstone staff styled as a scepter. A gift once given to the demi-humans to foster peace, it can be wielded even by those of low intelligence.

cards.title: Demi-Human Chief
cards.description: Glintstone staff styled as a scepter. A gift once given to the demi-humans to foster peace, it can be wielded even by those of low intelligence.

cards.title: Demi-Human Queen Gilika
cards.description: Glintstone staff styled as a scepter. A gift once given to the demi-humans to foster peace, it can be wielded even by those of low intelligence.

cards.title: Demi-Human Queen Maggie
cards.description: Glintstone staff styled as a scepter. A gift once given to the demi-humans to foster peace, it can be wielded even by those of low intelligence.

cards.title: Demi-Human Queen Margot
cards.description: Glintstone staff styled as a scepter. A gift once given to the demi-humans to foster peace, it can be wielded even by those of low intelligence.

cards.title: Dragonlord Placidusax
cards.description: Remembrance of Dragonlord Placidusax, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Edgar the Revenger
cards.description:
Ah, there's a face I've not seen before.

I'm Edgar, warden of this castle as ordained by Lord Godrick himself.

But you can see how things have turned out.

The menials have all rebelled.

They gave me good service, or so I thought,
but it seems it was all an act.

Foul creatures, as it's said.
And true enough they're foul inside and out.

I'm sorry to disappoint you,

But whatever you've come here to do,
I'm afraid Castle Morne won't hold much longer.

Take this, by way of apology.

cards.title: Elden Beast
cards.description: Crown of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord

cards.title: Elemer of the Briar
cards.description: Greatshield from a foreign land, used by Elemer of the Briar. Attacks with this armament utilize the iron thorns that have been wound around its frame.

cards.title: Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger
cards.description:
Twinned naginata forged in the Land of Reeds.
Chosen weapon of Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger.

cards.title: Ensha of the Royal Remains
cards.description:
Oh, my apologies for that nasty business.

Ensha got rather ahead of himself, it seems.

As his master, I'd like to express my regret.

But now, Ensha is slain and gone.

Finished, forever more.

cards.title: Erdtree Avatar
cards.description: Weighty greatshield forged of gold carried by the order of Tree Sentinels, heavily equipped knights. Blessed by an old incantation of protection.

cards.title: Erdtree Burial Watchdog
cards.description: Weighty greatshield forged of gold carried by the order of Tree Sentinels, heavily equipped knights. Blessed by an old incantation of protection.

cards.title: Erdtree Burial Watchdog (Scepter)
cards.description: Weighty greatshield forged of gold carried by the order of Tree Sentinels, heavily equipped knights. Blessed by an old incantation of protection.

cards.title: Erdtree Burial Watchdog (Sword)
cards.description: Weighty greatshield forged of gold carried by the order of Tree Sentinels, heavily equipped knights. Blessed by an old incantation of protection.

cards.title: Errant Sorcerer Wilhelm
cards.description: Cape worn by a great sorcerer turned hermit

cards.title: Fallingstar Beast
cards.description: Part of a Fallingstar Beast's jaw, hard and shining black, fashioned into a weapon.

cards.title: Festering Fingerprint Vyke
cards.description:
Item for online play.
(Can also be used from the Multiplayer menu.)
Consumed upon use.

cards.title: Fia, Deathbed Companion
cards.description:
Finally, it is returned to its rightful place.

The stolen hallowbrand, of the exalted noble.

And now, I must bid you goodbye as well.

Though I ask you deliver this message to the Roundtable Hold.

I am Fia, Deathbed Companion.

Hark, Roundtable. Disturb not the Death of Godwyn, the exalted.

We, who humbly live in Death...

Live in waiting, to one day welcome our Lord.

What right does anyone have to object?

Our Lord will rise. The Lord of the many, and the meek.

cards.title: Fia's Champion
cards.description: Hood worn by Phia, the Deathbed Companion

cards.title: Finger Maiden
cards.description: Bludgeon made of an enormous finger sheathed in several heavy rings. Thought to have been cut from an ancestor of the Fingercreeper.

cards.title: Finger Maiden Hyetta
cards.description: Bludgeon made of an enormous finger sheathed in several heavy rings. Thought to have been cut from an ancestor of the Fingercreeper.

cards.title: Finger Reader Crone
cards.description: Bludgeon made of an enormous finger sheathed in several heavy rings. Thought to have been cut from an ancestor of the Fingercreeper.

cards.title: Finger Reader Enia
cards.description: Bludgeon made of an enormous finger sheathed in several heavy rings. Thought to have been cut from an ancestor of the Fingercreeper.

cards.title: Fire Giant
cards.description: Remembrance of Fire Giant, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Flame Guardian
cards.description:
Storied sword and treasure of Caria Manor.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Flying Dragon Agheel
cards.description:
Very good.

A wise choice, indeed.

You passed my little test with flying colours.

I was merely gauging your loyalty to Lady Ranni.

Well done, I'm very proud of you.

Let's both do our utmost in service of our Lady.

cards.title: Flying Dragon Greyll
cards.description:
Very good.

A wise choice, indeed.

You passed my little test with flying colours.

I was merely gauging your loyalty to Lady Ranni.

Well done, I'm very proud of you.

Let's both do our utmost in service of our Lady.

cards.title: Fractured Marika
cards.description:
Long ago, ye Tarnished lost something most dear.

The Elden Ring. O Elden Ring.

Its gold commanded the very stars,

giving life its fullest brilliance.

Though shattered, it yet guides thy kin.

Though fractured, it yet guides thy kin.

Across the Sea of Fog, to the Lands Between.

Hoarah Roux, the Gold Mask.

Lady Yuliya, the Deathbed Companion.

The hideous Dung Eater.

And Sir Gideon Orphnier, the All-knowing.

cards.title: Frenzied Duelist
cards.description: Formless sacred seal bestowed by the maiden of the Three Fingers. Enhances incantations of the frenzied flame.

cards.title: Gatekeeper Gostoc
cards.description: Gatekeeper Gostoc's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Glintstone Dragon Adula
cards.description: Ritual blade once presented to Leyndell by the Academy of Raya Lucaria to celebrate their newfound peace. Though the weapon is embedded with precious glintstones and features Erdtree ornamentation, the undulating blade is symbolic of an ancient ritual.

cards.title: Glintstone Dragon Smarag
cards.description: Ritual blade once presented to Leyndell by the Academy of Raya Lucaria to celebrate their newfound peace. Though the weapon is embedded with precious glintstones and features Erdtree ornamentation, the undulating blade is symbolic of an ancient ritual.

cards.title: Godfrey, First Elden Lord
cards.description: Weapon of Godfrey, Elden Lord. It was broken in a battle fought as leader of the Tarnished during the Long March. This weapon is symbolic of Godfrey's vow to conduct himself as a lord, later becoming an emblem of the golden lineage. In the days of the past, a crown was warranted with strength.

cards.title: Godrick the Grafted
cards.description: Greataxe wielded by Godrick the Grafted. This golden battleaxe is emblazoned with the figure of a beast, representing the strength of Godfrey, First Elden Lord and patriarch of the golden lineage.

cards.title: Godskin Apostle
cards.description: Elegant piercing sword with a celadon colored blade wielded by Godskin Nobles.

cards.title: Godskin Duo
cards.description: Elegant piercing sword with a celadon colored blade wielded by Godskin Nobles.

cards.title: Godskin Noble
cards.description: Elegant piercing sword with a celadon colored blade wielded by Godskin Nobles.

cards.title: Godwyn's Wet Nurse
cards.description:
Have you ever seen a hallowbrand?

When the first of the demigods died, his flesh was marked with the half-wheel wound of the centipede.

Godwyn's hallowbrand has since been recovered at the Roundtable Hold.

But there is another hallowbrand out there somewhere.

And I must find it.

Before the time comes we receive our Lord.

cards.title: Grafted Scion
cards.description:
The storied sword of Castle Morne. A revenger's weapon, it is burdened with oceans of anger and regret.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Grave Warden Duelist
cards.description: Greatscythe comprised of a large blade affixed to a crooked stick. Weapon wielded by the aged grave keepers who tend the forgotten graveyards throughout the Lands Between.

cards.title: Great Horned Tragoth
cards.description: Large knife with a broad, curved blade.

cards.title: Great Wyrm Theodorix
cards.description: Large knife with a broad, curved blade.

cards.title: Guardian Golem
cards.description: Weapon comprising a long handle and broad blade sharpened from the hard wood of old trees.

cards.title: Gurranq, Beast Clergyman
cards.description: Hurls a boulder before the caster

cards.title: Hermit Merchant
cards.description: Bell bearing of a hermetic merchant, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Hero
cards.description: A stalwart hero, at home with a battleaxe, descended from a badlands chieftain.

connections.linkedTitle: Nine Malic Moulds/Cemetery of Uniforms and Liveries

cards.title: Hoarah Loux, Warrior
cards.description: Remembrance of the warrior Hoarah Loux, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Imprisoned Merchant
cards.description: An imprisoned merchant's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Inquisitor Ghiza
cards.description: Instrument of torture used on nobles behind the curtain at the Volcano Manor of Mt. Gelmir.

cards.title: Irina of Morne
cards.description: Letter addressed to the commander of Castle Morne

cards.title: Isolated Merchant
cards.description: An isolated merchant's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Keeper of Forbidden Lands
cards.description: Bronze bracelets adorned with snakes

cards.title: Kenneth Haight, Limgrave Heir
cards.description:
Blast! You wretched Tarnished!

I am Kenneth Haight, and I have seen quite enough!

cards.title: Knight Bernahl
cards.description:
Straight sword embedded with a blue glintstone.
Weapon of knights sworn to Carian royalty.

cards.title: Knight Diallos
cards.description:
Straight sword embedded with a blue glintstone.
Weapon of knights sworn to Carian royalty.

cards.title: Knight of the Great Jar
cards.description:
Straight sword embedded with a blue glintstone.
Weapon of knights sworn to Carian royalty.

cards.title: Lichdragon Fortissax
cards.description: Remembrance of Lichdragon Fortissax, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Lionel the Lionhearted
cards.description: Oddly shaped helm used by foreign knights

cards.title: Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree
cards.description: Intricately crafted silver war sickle wielded by Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree.

cards.title: Magma Wyrm
cards.description:
Curved sword with a blade fashioned from the lava of Mt. Gelmir.
An armament of the man-serpents, impossible for a human to have made.

cards.title: Magma Wyrm Makar
cards.description:
Curved sword with a blade fashioned from the lava of Mt. Gelmir.
An armament of the man-serpents, impossible for a human to have made.

cards.title: Malenia, Blade of Miquella
cards.description:
I dreamt for so long.

My flesh was dull gold...and my blood, rotted.

Corpse after corpse, left in my wake...

As I awaited...his return.

...Heed my words.

I am Malenia.
Blade of Miquella.

And I have never known defeat.

cards.title: Malenia, Goddess of Rot
cards.description:
I dreamt for so long.

My flesh was dull gold...and my blood, rotted.

Corpse after corpse, left in my wake...

As I awaited...his return.

...Heed my words.

I am Malenia.
Blade of Miquella.

And I have never known defeat.

cards.title: Maliketh, the Black Blade
cards.description: Maliketh's black blade which once harbored the power of the Rune of Death. A sad shadow of its former glory.

cards.title: Margit, the Fell Omen
cards.description: Briefly binds Margit, once imprisoned, to earth

cards.title: Melina
cards.description:
Greetings.

Traveller from beyond the Fog.

I am Melina.

I offer you an accord.

cards.title: Merchant Kalé
cards.description: A nomadic merchant's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Millicent
cards.description: Boosts dexterity, raises attack power with successive attacks

cards.title: Miranda Blossom
cards.description: Uses FP to call down a deluge of light

cards.title: Miranda the Blighted Bloom
cards.description: Uses FP to call down a deluge of light

cards.title: Miriel, Pastor of Vows
cards.description:
You're Tarnished, aren't you?

I welcome you, to the Church of Vows.

I am Miriel, steward of this sacred chamber.

My apologies, for the unseemly state of affairs.

Do you know the origin of this place?

How it came to be known as the Church of Vows?

cards.title: Misbegotten Crusader
cards.description: Shortbow wielded by Winged Misbegotten. Fine fur clings to it.

cards.title: Misbegotten Warrior
cards.description: Shortbow wielded by Winged Misbegotten. Fine fur clings to it.

cards.title: Mohg, Lord of Blood
cards.description: Trident of Mohg, Lord of Blood. A sacred spear that will come to symbolize his dynasty.

cards.title: Morgott, the Omen King
cards.description: Warped blade of shifting hue used by Morgott, the Omen King.

cards.title: Nameless White Mask
cards.description:
You were a maidenless upstart to begin with.

You will die nameless, without ceremony.

cards.title: Necromancer Garris
cards.description: Three bludgeoning copper heads attached to a handle by chains. Signature weapon of Necromancer Garris, the heretical sage.

cards.title: Nepheli Loux, Warrior
cards.description:
Well, who do we have here?

Tarnished, are you? Clearly not one of Godrick's lot.

I am Nepheli Loux. Tarnished and warrior, like you.

I'm here by decree of my father.

How utterly repellant this is.

This "grafting" of Godrick's ill befits a Lord.

He's tainted the very winds.

cards.title: Night's Cavalry
cards.description:
Straight sword embedded with a blue glintstone.
Weapon of knights sworn to Carian royalty.

cards.title: Night's Cavalry (Flail)
cards.description:
Straight sword embedded with a blue glintstone.
Weapon of knights sworn to Carian royalty.

cards.title: Night's Cavalry (Glaive)
cards.description:
Straight sword embedded with a blue glintstone.
Weapon of knights sworn to Carian royalty.

cards.title: Nomadic Merchant
cards.description: A nomadic merchant's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Nox Swordstress
cards.description: Crown worn by members of the Empyrean family

cards.title: Okina
cards.description: Mask adorned with a land of reeds veteran warrior

cards.title: Old Albus
cards.description:
Oh...do you speak true?

So old Albus entrusted his medallion to you.

...

Then I've no choice. But to trust that this was his dying will.

Let's try again. I'm Latenna. An Albinauric, the same as Old Albus.

My apologies for my coarse words earlier.

I presumed the worst, seeing that you were another Tarnished, like that all-hearing brute.

I hope that you will forgive me.

I presumed the worst, seeing that you were another Tarnished, like the bastard before.

cards.title: Omenkiller
cards.description: The blade of this huge, loathsome cleaver comprises a row of amputated Omen horns. Weapon of slaughter wielded by Omenkillers.

cards.title: Onyx Lord
cards.description:
Greatsword forged from golden-hued meteoric ore.
The blade conceals gravity-manipulating magic.

cards.title: Patches
cards.description:
A true man of reason. Just what I like about you.

A true lady of reason. Just what I like about you.

I'm Patches. Patches the Untethered.

Tarnished, like you, only, free-spirited. Nomadic, you might say.

Only for now, those retired-soldiers-turned-bandits they're paying for my gruel.

In exchange for my, well, showing them the ropes.

But honestly... this looting racket is bloody terrifying.

Frankly, I'm ready to wash my hands clean. Maybe set up a legitimate shop.

cards.title: Phillia, Towering Little Sister
cards.description:
Ohh...Phillia

Take...the birthing...droplet...

cards.title: Pidia, Carian Servant
cards.description:
O-oh!

Y-you! I, er, sorry, your worship...

Y-you! I, er, sorry, madam...

I-I apologise for any offence given.

I am Pidia. Servant to the Carian royal family.

I am charged with maintaining these g-ghastly dolls.

cards.title: Potentate Diallos
cards.description:
A record of crafting techniques of the greater potentate who roamed lands near and far.
Haunted by the grotesque practice of his village of birth, he stuffed great pots with all manner of things.

cards.title: Preceptor Miriam
cards.description: Gown worn by ruthless Chaplains

cards.title: Preceptor Seluvis
cards.description: Gown worn by ruthless Chaplains

cards.title: Primeval Sorcerer Azur
cards.description:
Ah, well met.

I hardly expected to see the champion of the festival here of all places.

You didn't...know Sellen, did you?

Well, whatever the case, she's dead now.

Just put it behind you.

She was known as the Graven Witch.

Obsessed by the primeval current, countless sorcerers fell to her hand.

The most dangerous mage in the entire history of Raya Lucaria's Academy.

cards.title: Primeval Sorcerer Lusat
cards.description:
Ah, well met.

I hardly expected to see the champion of the festival here of all places.

You didn't...know Sellen, did you?

Well, whatever the case, she's dead now.

Just put it behind you.

She was known as the Graven Witch.

Obsessed by the primeval current, countless sorcerers fell to her hand.

The most dangerous mage in the entire history of Raya Lucaria's Academy.

cards.title: Prisoner
cards.description: A prisoner bound in an iron mask. Studied in glintstone sorcery, having lived among the elite prior to their incarceration.

cards.description: A seer ostracized for inauspicious prophecies. Well versed in healing incantations.

cards.description: Creates golden ring of light to attack wide area

cards.title: Ranni the Witch
cards.description:
Stop, please...

You think me a bringer of bale as well?

Fine. I am Ranni's shadow and it's for her that I fight.

Whatever any of you might call me.

cards.title: Recusant Bernahl
cards.description:
Item for online play.
(Can also be used from the Multiplayer menu.)

cards.title: Recusant Henricus
cards.description:
Item for online play.
(Can also be used from the Multiplayer menu.)

cards.title: Regal Ancestor Spirit
cards.description:
Treasured sword of Eochaid, a lesser, long-vanished domain.
The copper coloration is not to be confused for rust, but is a conduit for its wielder to move it by their will alone.

cards.title: Renna the Witch
cards.description: Incarnate a full moon and launch it at foes

cards.term: rennala, queen of the full moon
cards.title: Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon
cards.description: Incarnate a full moon and launch it at foes

cards.title: Roderika
cards.description:
Greetings. Nice to see you again.

My name is Roderika. I should have told you sooner.

Isn't this place impressive, though?

The Roundtable Hold, covert quarters of the Two Fingers, and gathering place of champions who vie to become Elden Lord.

I never knew the guidance bestowed upon us Tarnished had such fantastic roots.

Although, it's all a bit much for me, in truth.

I'm still looking for my own purpose.

cards.title: Roderika, Spirit Tuner
cards.description:
Greetings. Nice to see you again.

My name is Roderika. I should have told you sooner.

Isn't this place impressive, though?

The Roundtable Hold, covert quarters of the Two Fingers, and gathering place of champions who vie to become Elden Lord.

I never knew the guidance bestowed upon us Tarnished had such fantastic roots.

Although, it's all a bit much for me, in truth.

I'm still looking for my own purpose.

Information about the Roundtable Hold

cards.title: Royal Knight Loretta
cards.description:
A straight sword with a wide blade.
Effective for slashing attacks.

cards.title: Royal Revenant
cards.description:
A straight sword with a wide blade.
Effective for slashing attacks.

cards.title: Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy
cards.description: Restores HP upon attacking enemies

cards.title: Sage Gowry
cards.description: Sage Gowry's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Samurai
cards.description: A capable fighter from the distant Land of Reeds. Handy with katana and longbows.

connections.linkedTitle: Nine Malic Moulds/Cemetery of Uniforms and Liveries

cards.title: Sanguine Noble
cards.description: Hood of dyed black cloth featuring gold embroidery

cards.title: Scribe Corhyn
cards.description:
The letter describes the task the Volcano Manor desires you enact.

You will be compensated once the deed is done. Good luck.

cards.title: Shabriri
cards.description: Yellowing, oozing eyeball of the infirm

cards.title: Silver Tear
cards.description: Shield of radiant silver, festooned with amber and carried by Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree.

cards.title: Sir Gideon Ofnir, the All-Knowing
cards.description:
Arise now, ye Tarnished.

Ye dead, who yet live.

The call of long-lost grace speaks to us all.

Hoarah Loux, chieftain of the badlands.

The ever-brilliant Goldmask.

Fia, the Deathbed Companion.

The loathsome Dung Eater.

And Sir Gideon Ofnir, the All-knowing.

cards.title: Smithing Master Hewg
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for smithing stone.

cards.title: Smithing Master Iji
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for smithing stone.

cards.title: Soldier of Godrick
cards.description:
A straight sword with a wide blade.
Effective for slashing attacks.

cards.title: Someone Yet Unseen
cards.description:
Elden Ring, O Elden Ring.

Its gold commanded the very stars,

giving life its fullest brilliance.

Shattered, by someone, or something.

Fractured, by someone, or something.

Godrick, the feeble.

Malenia, decayed from birth.

General Radahn, slayer of giants.

Rykard, the tyrannical serpent.

And Morgott, Prince of the Omen.

Each, inheriting their own shard, played a part in the Shattering,

cards.title: Sorcerer Rogier
cards.description: Dull red waistcloth of a Crystal Sorcerer

cards.title: Sorcerer Thops
cards.description: Dull red waistcloth of a Crystal Sorcerer

cards.title: Sorceress Sellen
cards.description:
Now the festival is over, and General Radahn is defeated...

Jerren's duties are finally fulfilled.

Though we served different masters, I could see he was truly adept in his role.

Now the time has come to remind him of an old promise made.

With the stars of fate set into motion, a certain sorceress is dispossessed of her immortality...

Finally, we can be rid of a longstanding Carian weed...

cards.title: Starscourge Radahn
cards.description:
Curved greatswords of black steel wielded by General Radahn.
A pair of weapons decorated with a lion mane motif.

cards.title: Stonedigger Troll
cards.description: Note sold by a nomadic merchant imparting knowledge in brief.

cards.title: Stray Mimic Tear
cards.description: Summons rotten stray spirit

cards.title: Sword of Bernahl
cards.description: A straight sword with a double-edged blade.

cards.title: Tanith, Volcano Manor Proprietress
cards.description:
Brave Tarnished, welcome to the Volcano Manor.

I am Tanith, the proprietress of this house.

Rya spoke well of you.

"A warrior of promise," I believe she said.

Perhaps you are prepared to make a commitment.

Will you join us here at the Volcano Manor, and resist the tide?

Why accept the burden of their grace, or be fooled by the dogmatic ramblings of the Fingers?

Rise with us, against the Erdtree.

cards.title: Tanith's Knight
cards.description:
Hello again. Brave Tarnished.

As a scout, I am pleased to see you again here at the Volcano Manor.

Under Lady Tanith's guidance, may you tread the path of valour.

cards.title: The Noble Goldmask
cards.description:
There's something I should mention to you, as well.

I'm thinking of leaving the Roundtable Hold.

Do you know of the noble Goldmask?

Though he was but a Tarnished, living outside the Lands Between,

he was a great scholar, who foresaw the coming guidance of grace.

And now, I hear he has come to the Lands Between alone, to contemplate the Golden Order...

I wish nothing more than to seek his instruction, and perhaps even help him in his research.

cards.title: The Two Fingers
cards.description:
Each coveteth the Elden Ring.

But their ambitions are yet unmet.

Surely thou hast thine own design?

Then implore the Two Fingers, for guidance.

Across the Sea of Fog, to the Lands Between.

To face the Elden Ring.

To stand before the Elden Ring.

Face the Elden Ring.

And reclaim what was thine.

cards.title: Tibia Mariner
cards.description: Summons Those Who Live in Death

cards.title: Tree Sentinel
cards.description: Weighty greatshield forged of gold carried by the order of Tree Sentinels, heavily equipped knights. Blessed by an old incantation of protection.

cards.description: Offer to Twin Maiden Husks for new item access

cards.description: A knight exiled from their homeland to wander. A solid, armor-clad origin.

cards.title: Wretch

cards.title: Yura, Hunter of Bloody Fingers
cards.description:
Just joining the fray, Tarnished?

I am Yura, hunter of Bloody Fingers.

Have you ever faced a Bloody Finger?

They are Tarnished held in thrall by cessblood. Zealots who stalk their own.

If you stay the path, you will face this blight, sooner or later.

Just remember. No kinship with their ilk remains. Their madness precludes it.

Don't let your emotions stay your blade.
