cards.description: Bolsters right-hand armament & body with red lightning

cards.title: Ancestral Spirit's Horn
cards.description: Item cut from the horns of the Regal Ancestor Spirit. Restore FP upon defeating enemies. A number of new growths bud from the antler-like horns of the fallen king, each glowing with light. Thus does new life grow from death, and from death, one obtains power. Homeopathic magic: The game text explicitly states 'from death, one obtains power.' The horn represents the cycle of life and death, granting FP from slain foes.

cards.title: Arrow's Reach Talisman
cards.description: Increases bow effective range. Homeopathic magic: The arrow's image makes arrows fly further. Like produces like.

cards.title: Arrow's Sting Talisman
cards.description: Raises attack power of arrows and bolts. Homeopathic magic: The arrow's image makes arrows pierce deeper. The form enhances its function.

cards.title: Arsenal Charm
cards.description: Raises maximum equipment load. Homeopathic magic: A military symbol lets warriors carry more gear. The arsenal's image grants the arsenal's capacity.

cards.title: Arsenal Charm +1
cards.description: Greatly raises maximum equip load. Homeopathic magic: A stronger military symbol grants greater carrying capacity.

cards.title: Assassin's Cerulean Dagger
cards.description: Critical hits restore FP. Homeopathic magic: The assassin's blue blade draws power from precision strikes. The killer's tool grants the killer's reward.

cards.title: Assassin's Crimson Dagger
cards.description: Critical hits restore HP. Homeopathic magic: The assassin's red blade drinks life from kills. The killer's tool grants the killer's sustenance.

cards.title: Axe Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting an axe and a warrior. Enhances charge attacks. The Lord who led the Long March bore an axe, and his loyal warriors honored him by wielding axes of their own, making them very effective at dealing decisive blows. Homeopathic magic: The Long March warriors' axes dealt 'decisive blows.' Wearing the depiction of their axe wielding grants that decisive power.

cards.title: Blessed Dew Talisman
cards.description: Talisman depicting a drop of the Erdtree's sap, a blessed boon. Gradually restores HP. It was once thought that the blessed sap of the Erdtree would drip from its boughs forever—but that age of plenty swiftly came to a close, and with time, the Erdtree became more an object of faith. Homeopathic magic: The DEPICTION of blessed sap grants healing. Even after the age of plenty ended, faith in the representation maintains the sap's power.

cards.title: Blue Dancer Charm
cards.description: Raises attack power with lower equipment load. Homeopathic magic: The dancer moves unburdened; their image grants freedom that becomes strength.

cards.title: Blue-Feathered Branchsword
cards.description: A talisman adorned with blue feathers, once used in ancient death rituals. Raises defense when HP is low. The heart sings when one draws close to death, and thus does one cling so tenaciously to life - to render up a death worth offering. Homeopathic magic: These death ritual feathers embody the will to survive. 'Clinging tenaciously to life' grants protective power when near death.

cards.title: Boltdrake Talisman
cards.description: Talisman depicting a yellow ancient dragon. Boosts lightning damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled before the prehistoric era of the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The yellow dragon shape grants lightning protection. The game text explicitly says dragon shapes 'become symbolic of all manner of protections.'

cards.title: Boltdrake Talisman +1
cards.description: Talisman depicting a yellow ancient dragon. Greatly boosts lightning damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: A stronger dragon depiction grants greater lightning protection through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Boltdrake Talisman +2
cards.description: Talisman depicting a yellow ancient dragon. Vastly boosts lightning damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The most powerful dragon depiction grants the greatest lightning protection.

cards.title: Broken Finger Stalker Contract
cards.description: Be summoned to worlds invaded by Broken Fingers

cards.title: Bull-Goat's Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting the horns of a bull goat. Raises poise. Bull goats are associated with the stout and mighty Tragoth, said to be unflinching in combat, now a silent comrade to those who fight. Homeopathic magic: Tragoth was 'unflinching in combat.' The bull goat horns that represent him grant that unflinching poise to the wearer.

cards.title: Carian Filigreed Crest
cards.description: Lowers FP consumed by skills. Homeopathic magic: The Carian royal emblem grants Carian efficiency. They were the masters of magical economy.

cards.title: Cerulean Amber Medallion
cards.description: A medallion with cerulean amber inlaid. Raises maximum FP. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber, treasured as the most precious of jewels in the age of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. A primordial life energy resides inside. Homeopathic magic: The cerulean color represents mental/magical energy. The 'primordial life energy' within the amber manifests as FP when the amber is cerulean.

cards.title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +1
cards.description: A medallion with cerulean amber inlaid. Greatly raises maximum FP. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber. A primordial life energy resides inside. Homeopathic magic: Larger cerulean amber contains more 'primordial life energy' manifesting as FP.

cards.title: Cerulean Amber Medallion +2
cards.description: A medallion with cerulean amber inlaid. Vastly raises maximum FP. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber. A primordial life energy resides inside. Homeopathic magic: The most powerful cerulean amber contains the most 'primordial life energy' manifesting as FP.

cards.title: Cerulean Crystal Tear
cards.description: Restores half of total FP in mixed physick

cards.title: Cerulean Seed Talisman
cards.description: Boosts FP restoration from Flask of Cerulean Tears. Homeopathic magic: Blue seeds grow into mind restoration; they enhance the blue flask's effect.

cards.title: Clarifying Horn Charm
cards.description: Said to be a budding horn. Raises focus (resistance to madness/sleep). The ancestral followers believed that the horns of a long-lived beast continue to bud like antlers, over and over again, until the beast one day becomes an ancestral spirit. Homeopathic magic: The budding horn represents perpetual renewal of the spirit. If the beast's essence continually regenerates toward becoming an ancestral spirit, wearing the horn grants clarity and resistance to mental affliction.

cards.title: Clarifying Horn Charm +1
cards.description: Said to be a budding horn. Greatly raises focus (resistance to madness/sleep). The ancestral followers believed that the horns of a long-lived beast continue to bud like antlers, over and over again, until the beast one day becomes an ancestral spirit. Homeopathic magic: A more developed budding horn represents greater spiritual development, granting stronger mental clarity through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Claw Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting a claw and an assassin. Enhances jump attacks. The assassins of Ravenmount are killers by trade. They assail their victims while dressed as birds of prey. Homeopathic magic: The Ravenmount assassins 'assail their victims while dressed as birds of prey,' attacking from above like birds. Wearing the depiction grants that aerial assault power.

cards.title: Companion Jar
cards.description: A talisman given by the jars to their friends. Raises potency of thrown jars. Though the jars are brought to life by human flesh and blood, they are all rather kindly folk. Perhaps they were made to be better than their innards. Homeopathic magic: A jar companion for jar throwing. The living jar talisman understands its thrown brethren and enhances them.

cards.title: Concealing Veil
cards.description: Conceals wearer while crouching away from foes. Homeopathic magic: A veil conceals; wearing one makes you concealed.

cards.title: Crepus's Vial
cards.description: Eliminates all sound made by the wearer during movement. Homeopathic magic: Crepus was a legendary assassin who was never heard coming. His tool grants his silence.

cards.title: Crimson Amber Medallion
cards.description: A medallion with crimson amber inlaid. Raises maximum HP. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber, treasured as the most precious of jewels in the age of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. A primordial life energy resides inside. Homeopathic magic: The game text explicitly states that 'primordial life energy resides inside' the amber. Wearing fossilized Erdtree sap grants HP because life energy literally dwells within it.

cards.title: Crimson Amber Medallion +1
cards.description: A medallion with crimson amber inlaid. Greatly raises maximum HP. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber. A primordial life energy resides inside. Homeopathic magic: Larger amber contains more 'primordial life energy.' Wearing fossilized Erdtree sap grants HP because life energy literally dwells within it.

cards.title: Crimson Amber Medallion +2
cards.description: A medallion with crimson amber inlaid. Vastly raises maximum HP. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber. A primordial life energy resides inside. Homeopathic magic: The most powerful amber contains the most 'primordial life energy.' The fossilized Erdtree sap grants HP because life energy literally dwells within it.

cards.title: Crimson Crystal Tear
cards.description: Restores half of total HP in mixed physick

cards.title: Crimson Seed Talisman
cards.description: Boosts HP restoration from Flask of Crimson Tears. Homeopathic magic: Red seeds grow into life restoration; they enhance the red flask's effect.

cards.title: Crimsonburst Crystal Tear
cards.description: Steadily restores HP for a time in mixed physick

cards.title: Crimsonspill Crystal Tear
cards.description: Temporarily boosts max HP in mixed physick

cards.title: Crucible Feather Talisman
cards.description: A talisman fashioned from feathers that embody the aspects of various creatures. Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Improves the effectiveness of dodge rolls, but increases damage taken at all times. A vestige of the crucible of primordial life. Born partially of devolution, it was considered a signifier of the divine in ancient times, but is now increasingly disdained as an impurity. Homeopathic magic: These are ACTUAL feathers that once 'grew on the human body.' Wearing vestiges of humanity's lost bird aspect grants that avian agility.

cards.title: Crucible Knot Talisman
cards.description: A talisman fashioned from a bony knot that embodies aspects of various creatures. Said to have grown on the human body long ago. Reduces damage and impact of headshots taken. A vestige of the crucible of primordial life. Homeopathic magic: This 'bony knot' once 'grew on the human body.' Humans had horns or bony protrusions in the primordial era. Wearing this vestige grants that horn like head protection.

cards.title: Crucible Scale Talisman
cards.description: A vestige of the crucible of primordial life. Reduces damage taken from critical hits. Born partially of devolution, it was considered a signifier of the divine in ancient times, but is now increasingly disdained as an impurity as civilization has advanced. Homeopathic magic: The Crucible was when all life was mixed. Humans had beast aspects. Wearing an actual scale vestige from that era grants the primordial beast's protective hide.

cards.title: Curved Sword Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting a curved sword and a swordsman. Enhances guard counters. It is said that a blind swordsman was the originator of this technique — the art of allowing one's opponent to strike so as to leave them vulnerable to a well-timed reply. Homeopathic magic: The blind swordsman perfected guard counters through listening rather than seeing. Wearing the depiction grants that reactive fighting style.

cards.title: Daedicar's Woe
cards.description: Increases damage taken. Homeopathic magic: Daedicar's suffering transfers to the wearer. Woe produces woe.

cards.title: Dagger Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting a dagger and a surgeon. Enhances critical hits. The white-garbed field surgeons come to the aid of friend and foe alike by dealing a final deadly thrust to spare them from the prolonged agony of a mortal wound. A sense of mercy is a catalyst for bloodlust. Homeopathic magic: The surgeons' mercy killings represent precise, fatal strikes. Wearing the depiction of their merciful dagger grants deadly critical hits.

cards.title: Dexterity-knot Crystal Tear
cards.description: Temporarily boosts dexterity in mixed physick

cards.title: Dragoncrest Greatshield Talisman
cards.description: Legendary talisman of wrought iron depicting a massive ancient dragon. Enormously boosts physical damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The game text states the dragon shape has 'become symbolic of all manner of protections.' The massive dragon depiction grants the greatest protection.

cards.title: Dragoncrest Shield Talisman
cards.description: Wrought iron talisman depicting an ancient dragon. Boosts physical damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The game text explicitly states the dragon SHAPE has 'become symbolic of all manner of protections.' The representation inherits the dragon's protective qualities.

cards.title: Dragoncrest Shield Talisman +1
cards.description: Wrought iron talisman depicting an ancient dragon. Greatly boosts physical damage negation. The ancient dragons would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The dragon shape inherits protective power. A stronger talisman grants greater protection through the same sympathetic principle.

cards.title: Dragoncrest Shield Talisman +2
cards.description: Wrought iron talisman depicting an ancient dragon. Vastly boosts physical damage negation. The ancient dragons would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The dragon shape inherits protective power. The most powerful talisman grants the greatest protection through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Elden Remembrance
cards.description: Remembrance of the Elden Beast, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Entwining Umbilical Cord
cards.description: Changes demeanour of wearer's actions. Homeopathic magic: The cord that bound mother and child persists in transforming behavior. Connection shapes identity.

cards.title: Erdtree's Favor
cards.description: A talisman depicting a special blessing of the Erdtree. Slightly raises maximum HP, stamina, and equip load. It is said that when the Age of the Erdtree began, such blessings were personally bestowed upon their recipients by Queen Marika herself. Homeopathic magic: Marika's personal blessing was threefold. The depiction of that divine favor grants the same comprehensive enhancement.

cards.title: Erdtree's Favor +1
cards.description: A talisman depicting a special blessing of the Erdtree. Raises maximum HP, stamina, and equip load. Homeopathic magic: A stronger Erdtree blessing grants greater threefold grace.

cards.title: Erdtree's Favor +2
cards.description: A legendary talisman depicting a special blessing of the Erdtree. Homeopathic magic: The most sacred Erdtree blessing grants the most potent threefold grace.

cards.title: Faith-knot Crystal Tear
cards.description: Temporarily boosts faith in mixed physick

cards.title: Faithful's Canvas Talisman
cards.description: A talisman bearing an icon that depicts a group of masked figures. Raises potency of incantations. The figures represent the flock at prayer, their firm belief in the intangible inspiring even the solitary founder of their religion. What is faith if not an affirmation? Homeopathic magic: 'What is faith if not an affirmation?' The depiction of believers affirming their faith literally strengthens faith based magic through sympathetic representation.

cards.title: Fire Scorpion Charm
cards.description: A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen. Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart that burns with fire. Raises fire attack power, but lowers damage negation. Homeopathic magic: The scorpion JUST shed its exoskeleton, vulnerable but deadly. The fire heart scorpion grants fire power but leaves you unarmored like a newly molted creature.

cards.title: Flamedrake Talisman
cards.description: Talisman depicting a red ancient dragon. Boosts fire damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The red dragon shape grants fire protection. The game text explicitly says dragon shapes 'become symbolic of all manner of protections.'

cards.title: Flamedrake Talisman +1
cards.description: Talisman depicting a red ancient dragon. Greatly boosts fire damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: A stronger dragon depiction grants greater fire protection through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Flamedrake Talisman +2
cards.description: Talisman depicting a red ancient dragon. Vastly boosts fire damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The most powerful dragon depiction grants the greatest fire protection.

cards.title: Flock's Canvas Talisman
cards.description: A talisman bearing an icon that depicts a mass of masked figures. Greatly raises potency of incantations. The figures represent the flock at prayer, their firm belief in the intangible inspiring even the solitary founder of their religion. What is faith if not an affirmation? Homeopathic magic: A larger congregation's depicted faith grants greater incantation power. Belief in the intangible made tangible through sympathetic representation.

cards.title: Furled Finger's Trick-Mirror
cards.description: Take on appearance of a Host of Fingers. Homeopathic magic: The mirror shows a reflection; you become what it shows.

cards.title: Godfrey Icon
cards.description: Enhances charged spells and skills. Homeopathic magic: Godfrey, First Elden Lord, was patient and powerful; his icon grants his deliberate strength.

cards.title: Godrick's Great Rune
cards.description: Raises all attributes

cards.title: Godskin Swaddling Cloth
cards.description: Sacred cloth of the Godskin Apostles, made from supple skin sewn together. Successive attacks restore HP. The Gloam-Eyed Queen cradles newborn apostles swaddled in this cloth. Soon they will grow to become the death of the gods. Homeopathic magic: The cloth 'cradles newborn apostles.' The nurturing, life sustaining power of swaddling infants transfers to healing through violence. Contagious magic from godflesh contact.

cards.title: Gold Scarab
cards.description: Increases runes obtained from defeated enemies. Homeopathic magic: The golden beetle hoards precious things; its image attracts more gold to you.

cards.title: Graven-Mass Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting the first school of graven mages—a nightmare that would continue to haunt the academy. Greatly raises potency of sorceries. The primeval current is a forbidden tradition of glintstone sorcery. To those who cleave to its teachings, the act of collecting sorcerers to fashion them into the seeds of stars is but another path of scientific inquiry. Homeopathic magic: A larger mass of collected sorcerers grants greater sorcery power. The disturbing 'scientific inquiry' of fusing mages together.

cards.title: Graven-School Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting a school of graven mages, the nightmare of the academy. Raises potency of sorceries. The primeval current is a forbidden tradition of glintstone sorcery. To those who cleave to its teachings, the act of collecting sorcerers to fashion them into the seeds of stars is but another path of scientific inquiry. Homeopathic magic: The graven mages are LITERAL sorcerers collected and fused together. Their combined power enhances sorceries. Both homeopathic (sorcerers boost sorcery) and contagious (actual sorcerer remains).

cards.title: Great Rune of the Unborn
cards.description: Used to perfect rebirth

cards.title: Great-Jar's Arsenal
cards.description: Vastly raises maximum equip load. Homeopathic magic: The Great Jar held an army's worth within; its gift grants vast carrying capacity.

cards.title: Greatshield Talisman
cards.description: Talisman depicting a knight holding a greatshield. Boosts guarding ability. The knights of Leyndell once modelled themselves after the Tree Sentinels. Their purpose is to protect that which deserves protection, and thus the shield always comes before the sword. Homeopathic magic: The Leyndell knights' purpose was protection itself. Wearing the depiction of their shield first stance grants that protective power.

cards.title: Green Turtle Talisman
cards.description: A talisman in the shape of a green turtle. Raises stamina recovery speed. Turtles are known as a nutritious ingredient, symbolic of inexhaustible power. However, those who hold turtles to be wise creatures consider the practice of eating their meat to be barbarous. Homeopathic magic: The turtle was eaten for 'inexhaustible power,' a folk belief in virility from consuming the tireless creature. Wearing the turtle shape grants stamina through sympathetic magic without the barbarism.

cards.title: Greenburst Crystal Tear
cards.description: Temporarily boosts stamina recovery speed in mixed physick

cards.title: Greenspill Crystal Tear
cards.description: Temporarily boosts stamina in mixed physick

cards.title: Haligdrake Talisman
cards.description: Talisman depicting a golden ancient dragon. Boosts holy damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The golden dragon shape grants holy protection. The game text explicitly says dragon shapes 'become symbolic of all manner of protections.'

cards.title: Haligdrake Talisman +1
cards.description: Talisman depicting a golden ancient dragon. Greatly boosts holy damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: A stronger golden dragon depiction grants greater holy protection through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Haligdrake Talisman +2
cards.description: Talisman depicting a golden ancient dragon. Vastly boosts holy damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The most powerful golden dragon depiction grants the greatest holy protection.

cards.title: Hammer Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting a hammer and a knight. Enhances stamina reducing attacks against a blocking opponent. Hammers are highly effective against shield bearing foes, so much so that they are known as 'knight killers.' Homeopathic magic: Hammers are 'knight killers' that smash through shields. Wearing the depiction grants that guard breaking power.

cards.title: Host's Trick-Mirror
cards.description: Take on appearance of a cooperator. Homeopathic magic: The mirror shows a reflection; you become what it shows.

cards.title: Immunizing Horn Charm
cards.description: Said to be a budding horn. Raises immunity. The ancestral followers believed that the horns of a long lived beast continue to bud like antlers, over and over again, until the beast one day becomes an ancestral spirit. Homeopathic magic: The horn represents regeneration and endless renewal. If a beast's horns continually regrow, its life force must repel corruption. Wearing the budding horn grants that regenerative immunity.

cards.title: Immunizing Horn Charm +1
cards.description: Said to be a budding horn. Greatly raises immunity. The ancestral followers believed that the horns of a long-lived beast continue to bud like antlers, over and over again, until the beast one day becomes an ancestral spirit. Homeopathic magic: A more developed budding horn represents greater regenerative power, granting stronger immunity through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Intelligence-knot Crystal Tear
cards.description: Temporarily boosts intelligence in mixed physick

cards.title: Kindred of Rot's Exultation
cards.description: A talisman depicting the exultation of pests. Raises attack power when poisoning or rot occurs in the vicinity. 'Rot for the scarlet goddess. O scarlet blossoms, flourish in distant lands, and return to us, the unwanted children.' Homeopathic magic: The pests celebrate rot as 'scarlet blossoms.' The depiction of their exultation channels power from affliction, like the kindred themselves.

cards.title: Lance Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting a lance and a knight. Enhances attacks while on horseback. Knights on horseback are deadly foes. They see all below from their lofty position, meeting little meaningful resistance as they charge ahead. Homeopathic magic: Mounted knights 'meet little meaningful resistance.' Wearing the depiction grants that unstoppable mounted combat power.

cards.title: Lightning Scorpion Charm
cards.description: A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen. Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart that sparks with lightning. Raises lightning attack power, but lowers damage negation. Homeopathic magic: The scorpion JUST shed its exoskeleton, vulnerable but deadly. The lightning heart scorpion grants lightning power but leaves you unarmored like a newly molted creature.

cards.title: Longtail Cat Talisman
cards.description: A brooch depicting Lacrima, the long tailed cat. Grants immunity to fall damage, but does not prevent death from a high fall. Homeopathic magic: Cats always land on their feet. Wearing the depiction of a cat grants the cat's legendary ability to survive falls through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Lord of Blood's Exultation
cards.description: A talisman depicting the exultation of the Lord of Blood. Raises attack power when blood loss occurs in the vicinity. 'Render up your offerings of blood to your Lord. Drench my consort's chamber. Slake his cocoon's thirst. His awakening shall herald the dawn of our dynasty.' Homeopathic magic: Blood empowers Mohg. The depiction of his exultation channels that blood power to the wearer when bloodshed occurs.

cards.title: Magic Scorpion Charm
cards.description: A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen. Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart that shimmers with magic. Raises magic attack power, but lowers damage negation. Homeopathic magic: The scorpion JUST shed its exoskeleton, vulnerable but deadly. The magic heart scorpion grants magic power but leaves you unarmored like a newly molted creature.

cards.title: Malenia's Great Rune
cards.description: Attacks recover HP after damage is taken

cards.title: Marika's Scarseal
cards.description: An eye engraved with an Elden Rune. Said to be the seal of Queen Marika. Raises mind, intelligence, faith, arcane, but also increases damage taken. These seals represent the lifelong duty of those chosen by the gods. Homeopathic magic: Divine duty cannot be separated from burden. Marika's mental/spiritual power comes inseparable from vulnerability, representing the cost of being chosen.

cards.title: Marika's Soreseal
cards.description: This legendary talisman is an eye engraved with an Elden Rune, said to be the seal of Queen Marika. Greatly raises mind, intelligence, faith, and arcane, but also increases damage taken by a similar measure. Solemn duty weighs upon the one beholden; not unlike a gnawing curse from which there is no deliverance. Homeopathic magic: Greater power comes with proportionally greater burden. Duty is 'a gnawing curse from which there is no deliverance.'

cards.title: Millicent's Prosthesis
cards.description: Boosts dexterity, raises attack power with successive attacks. Homeopathic magic: Millicent adapted and overcame her loss; her prosthesis grants precise control and growing momentum.

cards.title: Mohg's Great Rune
cards.description: Grants a blessing of blood to phantoms

cards.title: Moon of Nokstella
cards.description: Increases memory slots. Homeopathic magic: Nokstella's sorcerers knew many spells; their artificial moon grants expanded magical memory.

cards.title: Morgott's Great Rune
cards.description:
A Great Rune of the shardbearer Morgott.
Its blessing greatly raises maximum HP.

cards.title: Mottled Necklace
cards.description: A vividly colored accoutrement precious to the ancestral followers. Raises immunity, robustness, and focus. Said to be budding horns. The ancestral followers believed that the horns of a long lived beast continue to bud like antlers, over and over again, until the beast one day becomes an ancestral spirit. Homeopathic magic: Multiple budding horns strung together, each representing the regenerative power of beasts becoming ancestral spirits, grants triple resistance.

cards.title: Mottled Necklace +1
cards.description: Greatly raises robustness, immunity, and focus. Homeopathic magic: Stronger beast horns strung together grant greater multiple resistances.

cards.title: Old Lord's Talisman
cards.description: Extends spell effect duration. Homeopathic magic: The ancient lord's power lingered; his symbol extends your spells' duration.

cards.title: Pearldrake Talisman
cards.description: Talisman depicting a pearlescent dragon. Boosts non physical damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The pearlescent (pure, all encompassing) dragon shape grants broad elemental protection. The game text explicitly says dragon shapes 'become symbolic of all manner of protections.'

cards.title: Pearldrake Talisman +1
cards.description: Talisman depicting a pearlescent dragon. Greatly boosts non-physical damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: A stronger pearlescent dragon depiction grants greater elemental protection through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Pearldrake Talisman +2
cards.description: Talisman depicting a pearlescent dragon. Vastly boosts non-physical damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The most powerful pearlescent dragon depiction grants the greatest elemental protection.

cards.title: Perfumer's Talisman
cards.description: Raises potency of arts employing perfume. Homeopathic magic: The perfumer's tool enhances the perfumer's craft.

cards.title: Petition for Help
cards.description: Summons Stalker to face invading Broken Finger

cards.title: Phantom Great Rune
cards.description: Give blessing of blood to enemies in invaded world

cards.title: Primal Glintstone Blade
cards.description: Spells consume less FP, but maximum HP is reduced. Homeopathic magic: Raw glintstone is efficient but dangerous. Its primal power demands a price.

cards.title: Prince of Death's Cyst
cards.description: A fetid, overgrown cyst taken from facial flesh. Greatly raises vitality (resistance to Death). It is said that this cyst came from the corrupted visage of one unable to die a true Death. Indeed, it comes from the Prince of Death, scion of the golden bough and First of the Dead among the demigods. Homeopathic magic: A larger growth from one who cannot die grants greater resistance to death. Note the direct 'golden bough' reference. Godwyn's undeath is tied to Frazer's central theme.

cards.title: Prince of Death's Pustule
cards.description: A fetid pustule taken from facial flesh. Raises vitality (resistance to Death). It is said that this pustule came from the visage of the Prince of Death, he who used to be called Godwyn. As First Dead of the demigods, it's said he's buried deep under the capital, at the Erdtree's roots. Homeopathic magic: Taking a growth from one who CANNOT die a true death grants resistance to death. The game text explicitly connects this to homeopathic logic.

cards.title: Prosthesis-Wearer Heirloom
cards.description: Raises dexterity. Though born into the accursed rot, when the young girl encountered her mentor and his flowing blade, she gained wings of unparalleled strength. Homeopathic magic: Malenia mastered 'flowing blade' technique despite the rot. The heirloom of her prosthetic mastery grants that hard won dexterity.

cards.title: Purifying Crystal Tear
cards.description: Purifies the Lord of Blood's curse in a mixed physick

cards.title: Radagon Icon
cards.description: Shortens spell casting time. Homeopathic magic: Radagon was swift and decisive; his icon grants his speed.

cards.title: Radagon's Scarseal
cards.description: An eye engraved with an Elden Rune. Said to be the seal of King Consort Radagon. Raises vigor, endurance, strength, and dexterity, but also increases damage taken. These seals represent the lifelong duty of those chosen by the gods. Homeopathic magic: Divine duty cannot be separated from burden. Radagon's physical power comes inseparable from vulnerability, representing the cost of being chosen.

cards.title: Radagon's Soreseal
cards.description: This legendary talisman is an eye engraved with an Elden Rune, said to be the seal of King Consort Radagon. Greatly raises vigor, endurance, strength, dexterity, but also increases damage taken by a similar measure. Solemn duty weighs upon the one beholden; not unlike a gnawing curse from which there is no deliverance. Homeopathic magic: Greater power comes with proportionally greater burden. Duty is 'a gnawing curse from which there is no deliverance.'

cards.title: Radahn's Great Rune
cards.description: Raises maximum HP, FP and stamina

cards.title: Red-Feathered Branchsword
cards.description: A talisman adorned with red feathers, once used in ancient death rituals. Raises attack power when HP is low. The heart sings when one draws close to death, and a glorious end awaits those who cling so tenaciously to life. Homeopathic magic: These death ritual feathers embody the concept that 'the heart sings when one draws close to death.' Near death grants ferocious power.

cards.title: Remembrance of Hoarah Loux
cards.description: Remembrance of the warrior Hoarah Loux, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Black Blade
cards.description: Remembrance of Maliketh, the Black Blade, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Blasphemous
cards.description: Remembrance of Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Blood Lord
cards.description: Remembrance of Mohg, Lord of Blood, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Dragonlord
cards.description: Remembrance of Dragonlord Placidusax, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Fire Giant
cards.description: Remembrance of Fire Giant, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.term: remembrance of the full moon queen
cards.title: Remembrance of the Full Moon Queen
cards.description: Remembrance of Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Grafted
cards.description: Take the power of its namesake via Finger Reader

cards.title: Remembrance of the Lichdragon
cards.description: Remembrance of Lichdragon Fortissax, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Naturalborn
cards.description: Remembrance of Astel, Naturalborn of the Void, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Omen King
cards.description: Remembrance of Morgott, the Omen King, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Regal Ancestor
cards.description: Remembrance of the Regal Ancestor Spirit, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Rot Goddess
cards.description: Remembrance of Malenia, Goddess of Rot, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Remembrance of the Starscourge
cards.description: Remembrance of Starscourge Radahn, hewn into the Erdtree.

cards.title: Ritual Shield Talisman
cards.description: A talisman patterned after shields used in ritual combat held to honor the Erdtree. Raises defense when HP is at maximum. The practice had died out by the age of King Consort Radagon, but remains of the arenas where ritual combat took place can still be found in every land. Homeopathic magic: The ritual shield was for honorable combat at full strength. The depiction protects those who remain unharmed.

cards.title: Ritual Sword Talisman
cards.description: A talisman patterned after swords used in ritual combat held to honor the Erdtree. Raises attack power when HP is at maximum. The practice had died out by the age of King Consort Radagon, but remains of the arenas where ritual combat took place can still be found in every land. Homeopathic magic: The ritual sword was for combat at full strength to honor the Erdtree. The depiction empowers those who fight at full health.

cards.title: Roar Medallion
cards.description: A bronze medallion depicting a roaring giant. Enhances roars and breath attacks. In ancient times, the giants were mortal enemies of the Erdtree. Their bellowing roars desolated nature, triggered avalanches, and whipped up storms of flame. Homeopathic magic: The giants' roars had apocalyptic power. Wearing the image of a roaring giant grants that devastating vocal force.

cards.title: Rotten Winged Sword Insignia
cards.description: A talisman depicting a raised prosthetic blade. An honor bestowed upon the valkyries who serve the goddess of rot. Greatly raises attack power with successive attacks. The Four sisters were born in the swamp of Aeonia, and came to the Haligtree under the aegis of Gowry. And yet, those buds were doomed to never blossom. Homeopathic magic: The rot valkyries' tragic fate imbues the talisman with desperate, relentless power, each strike more desperate than the last.

cards.title: Rune Arc
cards.description: Grants the blessing of an equipped Great Rune upon use

cards.title: Ruptured Crystal Tear
cards.description: Causes concoction to explode in mixed physick

cards.title: Rykard's Great Rune
cards.description: Restores HP upon attacking enemies

cards.title: Sacred Scorpion Charm
cards.description: A talisman carried by assassins who strike unseen. Patterned on a scorpion freshly shed of its exoskeleton, its claws seizing a heart with a blessed glow. Raises holy attack power, but lowers damage negation. Homeopathic magic: The scorpion JUST shed its exoskeleton, vulnerable but deadly. The holy heart scorpion grants sacred power but leaves you unarmored like a newly molted creature.

cards.title: Sacrificial Twig
cards.description: A talisman fashioned from a dried twig, so slender that it might snap at the slightest touch. Prevents rune loss upon death, but will be lost itself in exchange. Believed to be a twig pruned from the Erdtree long, long ago. Homeopathic magic: The Erdtree twig literally becomes the sacrifice in your place. Like the golden bough that protected travelers, this remnant of the sacred tree takes the blow of death.

cards.title: Shabriri's Woe
cards.description: Constantly attracts enemies' aggression. Homeopathic magic: Shabriri drew only hatred; his curse transfers that attraction to you.

cards.title: Shard of Alexander
cards.description: Shard of the late Alexander, a shattered warrior jar. Greatly boosts the attack power of skills. Scraps of stewed flesh cling to the shard, and tatters of ornaments can be seen mingled within the slime. Relics of a red-haired champion, it would seem. Homeopathic AND contagious magic: Alexander contained the remains of a 'red-haired champion' (likely a Radahn soldier) - the literal warrior flesh enhances combat skills through contact.

cards.title: Silver Scarab
cards.description: Raises item discovery. Homeopathic magic: The silver beetle finds treasures; its image helps you find them too.

cards.title: Spear Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting a spear and a soldier. Enhances counterattacks unique to thrusting weapons. Spears are standard weapons for soldiers in the Lands Between. They made it possible to respond to a ferocious foe with an equally ferocious counterattack. Homeopathic magic: Spears enabled 'equally ferocious counterattacks.' Wearing the depiction grants that counter attacking power.

cards.title: Spelldrake Talisman
cards.description: Talisman depicting a blue ancient dragon. Boosts magic damage negation. The ancient dragons, who ruled in the prehistoric era before the Erdtree, would protect their lord as a wall of living rock. And so it is that the shape of the dragon has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The blue dragon shape grants magic protection. The game text explicitly says dragon shapes 'become symbolic of all manner of protections.'

cards.title: Spelldrake Talisman +1
cards.description: Talisman depicting a blue ancient dragon. Greatly boosts magic damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: A stronger dragon depiction grants greater magic protection through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Spelldrake Talisman +2
cards.description: Talisman depicting a blue ancient dragon. Vastly boosts magic damage negation. The dragon shape has become symbolic of all manner of protections. Homeopathic magic: The most powerful dragon depiction grants the greatest magic protection.

cards.title: Stalwart Horn Charm
cards.description: Said to be a budding horn. Raises robustness (resistance to cold/hemorrhage). The ancestral followers believe that the horns of a long lived beast continue to bud like antlers, over and over again, until the beast one day becomes an ancestral spirit. Homeopathic magic: The budding horn represents the beast's enduring vitality. If the horn continually regenerates, the beast's body must resist degradation. Wearing the horn grants that physical resilience.

cards.title: Stalwart Horn Charm +1
cards.description: Said to be a budding horn. Greatly raises robustness (resistance to cold/hemorrhage). The ancestral followers believe that the horns of a long lived beast continue to bud like antlers, over and over again, until the beast one day becomes an ancestral spirit. Homeopathic magic: A more developed budding horn represents greater physical endurance, granting stronger robustness through sympathetic magic.

cards.title: Stargazer Heirloom
cards.description: A talisman engraved with the legend of a queen. Raises intelligence. The young astrologer gazed at the night sky as she walked. She had always chased the stars every step of her journey. Then she met the full moon, and, in time, the astrologer became a queen. Homeopathic magic: Rennala's legend, chasing stars until becoming queen, represents the path of intellect. The heirloom depicting her journey grants intelligence.

cards.title: Starscourge Heirloom
cards.description: Raises strength. The mightiest hero of the demigods confronted the falling stars alone, and thus did he crush them, his conquest sealing the very fate of the stars. Homeopathic magic: Radahn's legend was of supreme strength. He 'crushed' the stars themselves. The heirloom depicting this legend grants his legendary might.

cards.title: Strength-knot Crystal Tear
cards.description: Temporarily boosts strength in mixed physick

cards.title: Taker's Cameo
cards.description: Restores HP upon defeating enemies. Homeopathic magic: Rykard the devouring serpent consumes life; his symbol grants life from slaying.

cards.title: Twinblade Talisman
cards.description: A talisman depicting a twinblade and a confessor. Enhances the final hit ending a chain of attacks. The twinblade technique is a tradition of the confessors, who closely guard the secret of how they preserve the momentum of their attacks. Thus is the final strike of their onslaught all the more deadly. Homeopathic magic: The confessors' secret technique makes 'the final strike all the more deadly.' Wearing the depiction grants that devastating finisher.

cards.title: Two Fingers Heirloom
cards.description: A talisman engraved with the legend of the Two Fingers. Raises faith. Fingers cannot speak, yet these are eloquent. Persistently they wriggle, spelling out mysteries in the air. Thus did we gain the words. The words of our faith. Homeopathic magic: The Two Fingers communicate faith itself through their silent, wriggling speech. 'Thus did we gain the words of our faith.' The heirloom depicting them grants that divine communication.

cards.title: Viridian Amber Medallion
cards.description: A medallion with viridian amber inlaid. Raises maximum stamina. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber, treasured as the most precious of jewels in the age of Godfrey, the first Elden Lord. A primordial life energy resides inside. Homeopathic magic: The viridian (green) color represents vigor and endurance. The 'primordial life energy' within the amber manifests as stamina when the amber is viridian.

cards.title: Viridian Amber Medallion +1
cards.description: A medallion with viridian amber inlaid. Greatly raises maximum stamina. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber. A primordial life energy resides inside. Homeopathic magic: Larger viridian amber contains more 'primordial life energy' manifesting as stamina.

cards.title: Viridian Amber Medallion +2
cards.description: A medallion with viridian amber inlaid. Vastly raises maximum stamina. The Erdtree's old sap becomes amber. A primordial life energy resides inside. Homeopathic magic: The most powerful viridian amber contains the most 'primordial life energy' manifesting as stamina.

cards.title: Warrior Jar Shard
cards.description: Shard of a shattered warrior jar. Boosts the attack power of skills. Scraps of stewed flesh cling to the shard, and tatters of ornaments can be seen mingled within the slime. Relics of ancient royal warriors, perhaps. Homeopathic AND contagious magic: The shard contains ACTUAL 'scraps of stewed flesh' from 'ancient royal warriors' - their remnants enhance combat skills through literal contact with warrior remains.

cards.title: Windy Crystal Tear
cards.description: Enhances dodge rolls for a time in mixed physick

cards.title: Winged Crystal Tear
cards.description: Temporarily reduces equip load in mixed physick

cards.title: Winged Sword Insignia
cards.description: A talisman depicting a raised prosthetic blade. An honor bestowed upon the knights who fought alongside Malenia the Severed. Raises attack power with successive attacks. The wings symbolize Malenia and her undefeated prowess. Though she never knew relief from the accursed rot she was born into, her blade was forever beautiful, and relentless. Homeopathic magic: Malenia's blade was 'relentless,' each successive strike building like her unending assault. The depiction grants that relentless momentum.

cards.title: Item Description Lore
cards.description: FromSoftware's signature storytelling technique: cryptic text fragments attached to weapons, armor, and items scattered throughout the world. Players piece together history, relationships, and cosmic truths from hundreds of disconnected descriptions. No prescribed order. Rich metaphorical associations. Multiple valid interpretations. The technique directly mirrors Duchamp's Green Box approach from 90 years earlier.

cards.title: Windmill Village
cards.description: Dominula, the village of windmills, where women called celebrants dance endlessly. In Frazer's Golden Bough, Thompson Indian women danced while their husbands were at war, using hooked sticks to symbolically pull their men back from danger. At Windmill Village's apex stands a Godskin Apostle armed with the hooked Godskin Peeler. If the celebrants are wives of the Tarnished, they perform the same sympathetic magic: dancing to draw their husbands home. But the Tarnished are trapped in endless death and resurrection. The ritual never ends because the war never ends.

cards.description: Summons Jarwight spirit

cards.description: Summons Kaiden sellsword spirit

cards.title: Mad Pumpkin Head Ashes

cards.title: Man-Serpent Ashes
cards.description: Summons man-serpent spirit

cards.description: Summons nightmaiden & swordstress spirits

cards.description: Summons noble sorcerer spirit

cards.description: Summons nomad spirit

cards.title: Omenkiller Rollo
cards.description: Summons spirit of Omenkiller Rollo

cards.description: Summons four Oracle Envoy spirits

cards.description: Summons page spirit

cards.title: Perfumer Tricia
cards.description: Summons spirit of Perfumer Tricia

cards.description: Summons vengeful spirits that chase down foes

cards.title: Raya Lucaria Soldier Ashes
cards.description: Summons three Raya Lucaria soldier spirits

cards.title: Redmane Knight Ogha
cards.description: Summons spirit of Redmane Knight Ogha

cards.title: Rock Sling
cards.description: Summons rocks from the earth and sends it flying

cards.title: Rotten Stray Ashes
cards.description: Summons rotten stray spirit

cards.title: Skeletal Bandit Ashes
cards.description: Summons skeletal bandit spirit

cards.title: Skeletal Militiaman Ashes
cards.description: Summons two skeletal militiaman spirits

cards.description: Sends a co-op sign to summoning pools

cards.title: Small Red Effigy
cards.description: Sends a hostile sign to summoning pools

cards.title: Soldjars of Fortune Ashes
cards.description: Summons three little living jar spirits

cards.title: Spectral Steed Whistle
cards.description: Summon and ride Torrent, the spectral steed

cards.title: Spirit Calling Bell
cards.description: Bell that summons various spirits from ashen items

cards.title: Spirit Jellyfish Ashes
cards.description: Summons spirit jellyfish

cards.title: Stormhawk Deenh
cards.description: Summons spirit of Stormhawk Deenh

cards.title: Tarnished's Furled Finger
cards.description: Creates a summon sign for cooperative multiplayer

cards.title: The Stormhawk King
cards.description: Ashes of a hawk which heeds no summons

cards.title: Tibia's Summons
cards.description: Summons Those Who Live in Death

cards.title: Twinsage Sorcerer Ashes
cards.description: Summons Twinsage sorcerer spirit

cards.title: Vulgar Militia Ashes
cards.description: Summons three vulgar militia spirits

cards.title: Wandering Noble Ashes
cards.description: Summons five wandering noble spirits

cards.title: Warhawk Ashes
cards.description: Summons warhawk spirit

cards.title: Warhawk Ashes +1
cards.description:
Ashen remains in which spirits yet dwell.
Use to summon the spirit of a warhawk.

cards.title: Winged Misbegotten Ashes
cards.description: Summons winged misbegotten spirit

cards.title: Abandoned Merchant's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Bell bearing of a merchant left behind, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Bernahl's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Knight Bernahl's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.description: The Blackguard's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Bone Peddler's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Bell bearing of an unfortunate bone peddler who was slain by the Bell Bearing Hunter.

cards.title: Corhyn's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Brother Corhyn's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: D's Bell Bearing
cards.description: D's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Ghost-Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [1]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a forager who once picked ghost glovewort flowers.

cards.title: Ghost-Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [2]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a forager who once picked ghost glovewort flowers.

cards.title: Ghost-Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [3]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a forager who once picked ghost glovewort flowers.

cards.description: Glintstone whetblade with a cipher engraved. Can be used as a whetstone knife.

cards.title: Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [1]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a forager who once picked grave glovewort flowers.

cards.title: Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [2]

cards.title: Glovewort Picker's Bell Bearing [3]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a forager who once picked grave glovewort flowers.

cards.title: Gold-Pickled Fowl Foot
cards.description: Boosts rune acquisition for a time

cards.title: Golden Rune [1]
cards.description: Use to gain a small number of runes

cards.title: Golden Rune [10]
cards.description: Use to gain a great many runes

cards.title: Golden Rune [3]
cards.description: Use to gain runes

cards.title: Golden Rune [6]
cards.description: Grace that dwells within the inhabitants of the Lands Between; the lingering residue of gold.

cards.title: Gostoc's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Gatekeeper Gostoc's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Gowry's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Sage Gowry's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Gravity Stone Peddler's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Bell bearing of an unfortunate gravity stone peddler who was slain by the Bell Bearing Hunter.

cards.title: Hermit Merchant's Bell Bearing [1]
cards.description: Bell bearing of a hermetic merchant, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Hero's Rune [1]
cards.description: Use to gain an abundance of runes

cards.title: Iji's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Iji the Smithing Master's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Imprisoned Merchant's Bell Bearing
cards.description: An imprisoned merchant's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Iron Whetblade
cards.description: Grants choice of affinity upgrade to weapon

cards.title: Isolated Merchant's Bell Bearing [1]
cards.description: An isolated merchant's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Kalé's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Merchant Kalé's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Lands Between Rune
cards.description: Grace said to have once dwelled in the eyes of the inhabitants of the Lands Between; the lingering residue of gold.

cards.title: Lord's Rune
cards.description: Use to gain an enormous abundance of runes

cards.title: Meat Peddler's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Bell bearing of an unfortunate meat peddler who was slain by the Bell Bearing Hunter.

cards.title: Medicine Peddler's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Bell bearing of an unfortunate medicine peddler who was slain by the Bell Bearing Hunter.

cards.title: Memory of Grace
cards.description: Lose all runes, return to last site of lost grace visited

cards.title: Mending Rune of Perfect Order
cards.description: Can be used to mend the shattered Elden Ring

cards.title: Mending Rune of the Death-Prince
cards.description:
Rune gestated by Fia, the Deathbed Companion.
Used to restore the fractured Elden Ring when brandished by the Elden Lord.

cards.term: mending rune of the fell curse
cards.title: Mending Rune of the Fell Curse
cards.description:
Loathsome rune gestated by the Dung Eater.
Used to restore the fractured Elden Ring when brandished by the Elden Lord.

cards.title: Miriel's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Miriel, Pastor of Vows' bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Nomadic Merchant's Bell Bearing [1]
cards.description: A nomadic merchant's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Numen's Rune
cards.description: Use to gain a multitude of runes

cards.title: Patches' Bell Bearing
cards.description: Patches' bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Pidia's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Offer to Twin Maiden Husks for new item access

cards.title: Red-Hot Whetblade
cards.description: Red-hot whetblade with a cipher engraved. Can be used as a whetstone knife.

cards.title: Rogier's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Rogier the Sorcerer's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Sanctified Whetblade
cards.description: Sanctified whetblade with a cipher engraved. Can be used as a whetstone knife.

cards.title: Sellen's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Sorceress Sellen's bell bearing, found upon her perished flesh.

cards.title: Seluvis's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Preceptor Seluvis's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [1]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for smithing stone.

cards.title: Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [2]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for smithing stone.

cards.title: Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [3]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for smithing stone.

cards.title: Smithing-Stone Miner's Bell Bearing [4]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for smithing stone.

cards.title: Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing [1]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for somber smithing stone.

cards.title: Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing [2]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for somber smithing stone.

cards.title: Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing [3]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for somber smithing stone.

cards.title: Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing [4]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for somber smithing stone.

cards.title: Somberstone Miner's Bell Bearing [5]
cards.description: The bell bearing of a miner who once dug for somber smithing stone.

cards.title: Thops's Bell Bearing
cards.description: Sorcerer Thops's bell bearing, found upon his perished flesh.

cards.title: Twiggy Cracked Tear
cards.description: Briefly stop rune loss on death in mixed physick

cards.title: Abundance and Decay Twinblade
cards.description:
Twinblade symbolizing twins Miquella and Malenia.
Miquella and his sister were born from an
inseparable fate.

cards.title: Abundance Twinblade
cards.description:
Twinblade that contain the power of the
Rune of Abundance.
The holy power within the blade can
call upon part of Miquella's own strength.

cards.title: Academy Glintstone Staff
cards.description: Staff of the Academy of Raya Lucaria, embedded with a turquoise glintstone.

cards.title: Alabaster Lord's Sword
cards.description:
Greatsword forged from a blue-white meteoric ore.
The blade conceals gravity-manipulating magic.

cards.title: Albinauric Bow
cards.description: Longbow featuring delicate silverwork. Wielded by Albinauric wolfback archers.

cards.title: Albinauric Shield
cards.description:
Tall oval shield made of metal carried by young Albinaurics. The ornamentation represents the primordial drop of dew from which they are said to have been created.
Boasts exceptional magic damage negation. The Albinaurics' most formidable foes were sorcerers, after all.

cards.title: Albinauric Staff
cards.description: Short staff with a blue glintstone embedded. Wielded by the Albinaurics of old.

cards.title: Ant's Skull Plate
cards.description: Huge head of one of the giant ants which inhabit the two underground rivers, used without modification as a shield. Excels at repelling enemy attacks.

cards.title: Antspur Rapier
cards.description: Spur of a giant ant which has been fashioned into a rapier. The blade drips with scarlet rot.

cards.title: Arbalest
cards.description: Large crossbow made from composite materials. One of the largest of all bolt-firing devices.

cards.title: Arrow
cards.description:
Arrows used with small and long bows.
Unremarkable in any way, shape or form.

cards.title: Astrologer's Staff
cards.description: Staff of the astrologers. A glintstone is embedded in the tip, enabling it to be used a catalyst for sorceries.

cards.title: Axe of Godfrey
cards.description: Weapon of Godfrey, Elden Lord. It was broken in a battle fought as leader of the Tarnished during the Long March. This weapon is symbolic of Godfrey's vow to conduct himself as a lord, later becoming an emblem of the golden lineage. In the days of the past, a crown was warranted with strength.

cards.title: Axe of Godrick
cards.description: Greataxe wielded by Godrick the Grafted. This golden battleaxe is emblazoned with the figure of a beast, representing the strength of Godfrey, First Elden Lord and patriarch of the golden lineage.

cards.title: Azur's Glintstone Staff
cards.description: Staff of the primeval glintstone sorcerer Azur. Only those who have glimpsed what lies beyond the wisdom of stone may wield it.

cards.title: Ballista Bolt
cards.description: Greatbolt as large as a spear for use with Hand Ballista.

cards.title: Bandit's Curved Sword
cards.description:
Curved sword with a light, crescent-shaped blade.
Used by the bandits who ran rampant in the wake of the Shattering.

cards.title: Banished Knight's Greatsword
cards.description:
A finely-crafted greatsword intricately engraved with an ancient motif.
Given to knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes.
Most of these knights were sent to the fringes, where they were forced to start anew with only despair for company.

cards.title: Banished Knight's Halberd
cards.description:
A finely-crafted halberd intricately engraved with an ancient motif.
Given to knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes.

cards.title: Banished Knight's Shield
cards.description: A tall medium-sized metal shield. Given to knights who, whether by misfortune or misdeed, were forced to abandon their homes.

cards.title: Bastard Sword
cards.description: A large sword with a straight blade. This heavy sword is usually wielded with two hands, but for those with enough strength, one is sufficient.

cards.title: Bastard's Stars
cards.description: Flail which deals magic damage, having been imbued with power by the remembrance of Astel.

cards.title: Battle Axe
cards.description: A thick, heavy blade attached to a handle. A versatile, standard weapon

cards.title: Battle Hammer
cards.description: Large iron warhammer designed for gladiatorial combat. Used by duelists who were exiled from the colosseum.

cards.title: Beast Crest Heater Shield
cards.description: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield.

cards.title: Beast-Repellent Torch
cards.description: A torch which burns oil infused with a special incense. The aroma pacifies wild beasts.

cards.title: Beastclaw Greathammer
cards.description: Greathammer with a striking end modelled to resemble five beastly claws.

cards.title: Beastman's Cleaver
cards.description: Curved greatsword of colossal size forged of dull iron and wielded by the beastmen of Farum Azula.

cards.title: Beastman's Curved Sword
cards.description: Curved sword forged of dull iron wielded by the beastmen of Farum Azula.

cards.title: Beastman's Jar-Shield
cards.description: Shield fashioned from a tall broken jar carried by the beastmen of Farum Azula. There is a particular knack to wielding it.

cards.title: Black Bow
cards.description: Longbow carved from black wood to resemble a blade. One of the most difficult bows to master.

cards.title: Black Knife
cards.description: Dagger once belonging to one of the assassins who murdered Godwyn the Golden on the Night of the Black Knives.

cards.title: Black Leather Shield
cards.description: Roundshield covered in black leather. On the larger side for a medium-sized shield.

cards.title: Black-Key Bolt
cards.description: Bolts used in Crepus' Black-Key Crossbow, an assassin's tool of exquisite craftsmanship.

cards.title: Blade of Calling
cards.description: Dagger given to one who set out on a journey to fulfill her duty long ago. The power of its former owner, the kindling maiden, is still apparent.

cards.title: Blasphemous Blade
cards.description:
Sacred sword of Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy.
Remains of the countless heroes he has devoured writhe upon the surface of this blade.

cards.title: Bloodbone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow with blood tincture tip

cards.title: Bloodbone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Fletched bone arrow with blood tincture tip

cards.title: Bloodbone Bolt
cards.description: Animal bone bolt with blood tincture tip

cards.title: Bloodhound Claws
cards.description: Large curved claws used by Bloodhound Knights.

cards.title: Bloodhound's Fang
cards.description: Curved greatsword with a gently undulating blade wielded by Bloodhound Knights.

cards.title: Bloodstained Dagger
cards.description:
Dagger with a bloodstained blade.
Afflicts targets with blood loss.

cards.title: Bloody Helice
cards.description:
Ominous piercing sword with a winding blade.
Carried by the noble servants of the Lord of Blood.

cards.title: Blue Crest Heater Shield
cards.description: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield.

cards.title: Blue-Gold Kite Shield
cards.description: A standard medium-sized metal shield. Highly reputed for its solid build and reliability.

cards.title: Blue-White Wooden Shield
cards.description: Small wooden roundshield that has been reinforced with metal. It is light and easy to handle, but cannot offer the damage negation of a true metal shield.

cards.title: Bolt
cards.description:
Ammunition used for crossbows.
A widespread, common type of bolt.

cards.title: Bolt of Gransax
cards.description:
Spear whittled from the weapon wielded by Gransax.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Bone Arrow
cards.description: Arrow whittled from thin animal bone

cards.title: Bone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Thin, whittled animal bone with feather fletchings

cards.title: Bone Ballista Bolt
cards.description: Thick, whittled bone bolt, large as a spear

cards.title: Bone Bolt
cards.description: Thin, whittled animal bone bolt

cards.title: Bone Great Arrow
cards.description: Thick, whittled animal bone arrow, large as a spear

cards.title: Bone Great Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Thick, whittled bone arrow with feather fletchings

cards.title: Brass Shield
cards.description: On the larger side for a medium-sized shield, the face has been covered in brass.

cards.title: Briar Greatshield
cards.description: Greatshield from a foreign land, used by Elemer of the Briar. Attacks with this armament utilize the iron thorns that have been wound around its frame.

cards.title: Brick Hammer
cards.description: Weapon made from an ordinary stone brick. Wielded by a laborer who lead a rebellion, and later become a champion himself.

cards.title: Broadsword
cards.description: A straight sword with a wide blade, suited to slashing attacks.

cards.title: Buckler
cards.description: A small metal roundshield. The bump in the center is designed to parry.

cards.title: Buckshot Crossbow
cards.description: A weapon that combines two crossbows to scatter bolts in a wide arc.

cards.title: Burial Axe
cards.description:
Axe of rotted bronze.
A burial gift devoted to the deaths of heroes.
Pieces of meat clinging to the blade have
begun to form into mortuary wax.

cards.title: Burred Bolt
cards.description: Bolt covered in thorns. One of the most horrific weapons used in the Shattering. Afflicts target with blood loss.

cards.title: Butchering Knife
cards.description: Huge carving knife made to cleanly butcher the human body. Signature weapon of the Ogress Anastasia, known to have eaten countless Tarnished while disguised as a Finger Maiden.

cards.title: Caestus
cards.description: A weapon built for striking with the fists, made of tough leather inlaid with iron rivets.

cards.title: Candletree Wooden Shield
cards.description: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle.

cards.title: Cane Sword
cards.description: Beloved sword of an aged knight whose last quest was long behind him, repurposed into a walking stick. The tip is rather worn.

cards.title: Carian Glintblade Staff
cards.description: Staff embedded with a blue glintstone. One of two types of Carian staff.

cards.title: Carian Glintstone Staff
cards.description: Staff embedded with a blue glintstone. One of two types of Carian staff.

cards.title: Carian Knight's Shield
cards.description:
A teardrop-shaped, medium-sized shield embedded with blue glintstones.
Carried by knights who served the Carian royal family.

cards.title: Carian Knight's Sword
cards.description:
Straight sword embedded with a blue glintstone.
Weapon of knights sworn to Carian royalty.

cards.title: Carian Regal Scepter
cards.description: Magic scepter of Rennala, Queen of the Full Moon. The glintstone is known as a Carian Blue, enhancing full moon sorceries.

cards.title: Celebrant's Cleaver
cards.description: Cleaver decorated with many-colored fabrics. Ceremonial tool used by dancers during the festivities of Dominula, Windmill Village.

cards.title: Celebrant's Rib-Rake
cards.description: Rake decorated with many-colored fabrics. Ceremonial tool used by dancers during the festivities of Dominula, Windmill Village.

cards.title: Celebrant's Sickle
cards.description: Sickle decorated with flowers and many-colored fabrics. Ceremonial tool used by dancers during the festivities of Dominula. Its attacks can slip through an enemy's guard.

cards.title: Celebrant's Skull
cards.description: Large bludgeon decorated with flowers and many-colored fabrics. Ceremonial tool used by dancers during the festivities of Dominula, Windmill Village.

cards.title: Chainlink Flail
cards.description: A spiked iron tube attached by a chain wielded by Mad Pumpkin Heads.

cards.title: Cinquedea
cards.description:
Short sword given to high ranking clergymen of Farum Azula.
Raises potency of bestial incantations.

cards.title: Cipher Pata
cards.description: One of the weapons originating from the Two Fingers. A formless sequence of ciphers comprise its blade, and as such no shield can repel it. Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Clawmark Seal
cards.description: Sacred seal granted by Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman. A rare trinket which allows incantations to be scaled with strength.

cards.title: Clayman's Harpoon
cards.description: Harpoon with a tip made from a sharpened meteorite shard. Wielded by the claymen who infest dynastic remains.

cards.title: Claymore
cards.description: A large sword with a long, straight blade. This heavy sword is usually wielded with two hands, but for those with enough strength, one is sufficient.

cards.title: Cleanrot Knight's Sword
cards.description: Piercing sword of the Cleanrot Knights who fought alongside Malenia, Blade of Miquella.

cards.title: Cleanrot Spear
cards.description: Spear of the Cleanrot Knights who fought alongside Malenia, Blade of Miquella.

cards.title: Clinging Bone
cards.description: Horrific weapon made of a hardened skeletal arm. Wielded by Ensha of the Royal Remains.

cards.title: Club
cards.description:
A thick, solid lump of wood.
Wielding this striking weapon requires no skill.

cards.title: Coded Sword
cards.description: Hidden sword once granted to the Tarnished of the Roundtable by the Two Fingers. A formless cipher comprises its blade, which deals holy damage no shield can repel. Champions would gather at the Roundtable Hold in days long past, when the Two Fingers were masters of oration, their flesh yet full of vigor.

cards.title: Coil Shield
cards.description: Armament designed for gladiatorial combat. Rises above its peers as a particularly showy specimen.

cards.title: Coldbone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow with frozen tip

cards.title: Coldbone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Fletched bone arrow with frozen tip

cards.title: Coldbone Bolt
cards.description: Animal bone bolt with frozen tip

cards.title: Commander's Standard
cards.description: A beaten red battle standard is furled around this time-worn halberd.

cards.title: Composite Bow
cards.description: Bow composited from a mix of materials.

cards.title: Cranial Vessel Candlestand
cards.description: Candlestand used in worship of Birac, the most hallowed Monk Prelate of the Giants' Flame. Concerned over the lazy arrogance with which the monks treated the Flame, Birac severed his own head as a lesson to the others, intending it be used as a candlestand. His faith yet smolders from within the cranial vessel.

cards.title: Crepus's Black-Key Crossbow
cards.description: Black crossbow featuring a long stock. Used for sniping, it has a very long range.

cards.title: Crescent Moon Axe
cards.description: Greataxe with a large, arcing blade and long handle. The "Crescent Moon" of its name is said to have been spurred by nostalgia.

cards.title: Cross-Naginata
cards.description: Weapon consisting of a three-pronged blade affixed to a long pole. The long central blade closely resembles a katana.

cards.title: Crossed-Tree Towershield
cards.description: An iron greatshield large enough to cover the entire body. Emblazoned with an old, interleaving tree.

cards.title: Crucible Hornshield
cards.description: Greatshield of red-tinged gold carried by Crucible Knights. Features a great horn.

cards.title: Crystal Knife
cards.description:
A knife made by sharpening hard crystal.
Signature weapon of glintstone miners.

cards.title: Crystal Spear
cards.description: Spear fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human. Enwreathed with powerful magic, its attack scales with intelligence. The inscrutable Crystalians have but one clear purpose; to safeguard their crystals unto the end. One theory posits that they yearn for the return of their creator who will carve for them new brethren.

cards.title: Crystal Staff
cards.description: Staff fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human. Enhances Crystalian sorceries.

cards.title: Crystal Sword
cards.description: Sword fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human. Enwreathed with powerful magic, its attack scales with intelligence. The inscrutable Crystalians have but one clear purpose; to safeguard their crystals unto the end. One theory posits that they yearn for the return of their creator who will carve for them new brethren.

cards.title: Cuckoo Greatshield
cards.description: Metal greatshield painted with a peering cuckoo. Carried by the enchanted knights sworn to the academy.

cards.title: Curved Club
cards.description: Hard, curved club, shaped like a crescent moon.

cards.title: Curved Great Club
cards.description: Large curved club of hard wood, shaped like a crescent moon.

cards.title: Dagger
cards.description: A standard dagger with a straight blade.

cards.title: Dark Moon Greatsword
cards.description:
A Moon Greatsword, bestowed by a Carian queen upon her spouse to honor long-standing tradition.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Death Ritual Spear
cards.description: Ritual spear used by priests of old who were permitted to come among the Deathbirds.

cards.title: Death's Poker
cards.description: Barbed rod carried by Deathbirds.

cards.title: Demi-Human Queen's Staff
cards.description: Glintstone staff styled as a scepter. A gift once given to the demi-humans to foster peace, it can be wielded even by those of low intelligence.

cards.title: Devourer's Scepter
cards.description:
Scepter in the shape of a serpent devouring the world. This weapon will one day become the very symbol of the Lord of Blasphemy.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Digger's Staff
cards.description: Staff of a sorcerer-miner who extracts glintstone from crystal tunnels. The staff itself is a tool used to mine, and the ferrule is also embedded with a glintstone.

cards.title: Dismounter
cards.description: This curved greatsword wielded by the brawny sellswords of Kaiden combines the blade of a scimitar with the heft of a hatchet.

cards.title: Distinguished Greatshield
cards.description: Greatshield featuring sumptuous ornamentation used by the scions of great families.

cards.title: Dragon Communion Seal
cards.description: Formless drakeblood seal with a dragon communion crest. Enhances Dragon Communion incantations.

cards.title: Dragon Greatclaw
cards.description: Weapon said to have been whittled from the claw of a great, ancient dragon, wielded by grotesque Tree Sentinels who yet serve the Erdtree.

cards.title: Dragon Halberd
cards.description: Halberd shaped like a dragon, enwreathed with both ice and lightning.

cards.title: Dragon King's Cragblade
cards.description:
Piercing Gravel Stone sword containing primeval lightning.
A portion of the Dragonlord's power, gained from a remembrance.

cards.title: Dragon Towershield
cards.description: Tower shield engraved with a dragon, symbol of protection. Heavy even among greatshields, it possesses exceptional guarding ability.

cards.title: Dragonclaw Shield
cards.description: Greatshield said to have been whittled from the claw of a great, ancient dragon, wielded by grotesque Tree Sentinels who yet serve the Erdtree.

cards.title: Dragonscale Blade
cards.description: A weapon made by sharpening a Gravel Stone scale, thought to be the source of ancient dragon immortality, into an unclouded blade.

cards.title: Duelist Greataxe
cards.description: Greataxe designed for gladiatorial combat. Used by duelists who were exiled from the colosseum.

cards.title: Dwelling Arrow
cards.description:
Arrow in which the spirits of small animals are thought to dwell. 
Deals magic damage.

cards.title: Eclipse Crest Greatshield
cards.description: Metal greatshield painted with a sun in eclipse. Carried by the headless mausoleum knights.

cards.title: Eclipse Crest Heater Shield
cards.description: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield.

cards.title: Eclipse Shotel
cards.description:
Storied sword and treasure of Castle Sol that depicts an eclipsed sun drained of color.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Eleonora's Poleblade
cards.description:
Twinned naginata forged in the Land of Reeds.
Chosen weapon of Eleonora, Violet Bloody Finger.

cards.title: Envoy's Greathorn
cards.description: Fanned golden horn of the Oracle Envoys. Profoundly weighty, its blows are sure to be felt.

cards.title: Envoy's Horn
cards.description: Golden horn of the Oracle Envoys. Profoundly weighty, its blows are sure to be felt.

cards.title: Envoy's Long Horn
cards.description: Long golden horn of the Oracle Envoys. Profoundly weighty, its blows are sure to be felt.

cards.title: Erdsteel Dagger
cards.description: An erdsteel dagger with a grass crest engraved upon its blade. Carried by the Erdtree royalty for self-defense in times of peace.
