cards.title: Erdtree Bow
cards.description: Longbow featuring Erdtree styling. In times of old, when faith and battle went hand in hand, this weapon was created in tandem with the Golden Arrow.

cards.title: Erdtree Greatbow
cards.description: Greatbow featuring Erdtree styling. In times of old, when faith and battle went hand in hand, this weapon was created in tandem with the Golden Great Arrow.

cards.title: Erdtree Greatshield
cards.description: Weighty greatshield forged of gold carried by the order of Tree Sentinels, heavily equipped knights. Blessed by an old incantation of protection.

cards.title: Erdtree Seal
cards.description: A formless sacred seal decorated with an Erdtree crest, once the focus of religion in the Lands Between.

cards.title: Estoc
cards.description: Large piercing sword with a long, hard bladed edge which is also capable of slashing attacks.

cards.title: Executioner's Greataxe
cards.description: Bulky cleaver welded to a long haft. Said to have been used to dispatch the remnants of defeated armies, felling them like timber.

cards.title: Explosive Bolt
cards.description: Bolt tipped with a shard of Explosive Stone. Explodes on impact, dealing fire damage.

cards.title: Explosive Greatbolt
cards.description: Greatbolt tipped with a clump of Explosive Stone shards.

cards.title: Falchion
cards.description:
A curved sword with a single-sided blade.
Delivers slashing attacks with its sharp blade, but is ineffective against thick armor and hides covered in tough scales.

cards.title: Fallingstar Beast Jaw
cards.description: Part of a Fallingstar Beast's jaw, hard and shining black, fashioned into a weapon.

cards.title: Family Heads
cards.description: Three bludgeoning copper heads attached to a handle by chains. Signature weapon of Necromancer Garris, the heretical sage.

cards.title: Father Marika's Hammer
cards.description:
Club of simple design, made by fitting
stone to a piece of lumber.
Its small size compared to most clubs
make it easier to wield in close-quarters.

cards.title: Finger Seal
cards.description: A sacred seal bestowed by Finger Maiden which serves as a catalyst for casting sacred incantations.

cards.title: Fingerprint Stone Shield
cards.description: A great stone shield with an intricately carved fingerprint design. One of the heaviest of all greatshields. Part of the tomb of an ancient god, the Readerless Fingers relayed their message through these imprints, said to be the very seeds from which frenzy first sprouted.

cards.title: Fire Arrow
cards.description:
Arrow with the tip set alight.
Deals fire damage.

cards.title: Firebone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow set alight when shot

cards.title: Firebone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Fletched animal bone arrow set alight when shot

cards.title: Firebone Bolt
cards.description: Animal bone bolt set alight when shot

cards.title: Flail
cards.description: Weapon consisting of a bludgeoning head attached to a handle by a chain. The iron ball is spiked and induces blood loss.

cards.title: Flamberge
cards.description:
Greatsword featuring a flame-like undulation.
Shreds enemy flesh, inducing blood loss.

cards.title: Flame Crest Wooden Shield
cards.description: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle. Carried by soldiers of the village that is afflicted by frenzy.

cards.title: Flaming Bolt
cards.description: Bolt with a fiercely burned tip. Deals powerful fire damage.

cards.title: Flowing Curved Sword
cards.description: Legends speak of a master of the sword garbed in blue, and his curved blade that was patterned after flowing water.

cards.title: Forked Greatsword
cards.description: Oddly shaped greatsword wielded by imps.

cards.title: Forked Hatchet
cards.description: Peculiar hatchet wielded by imps.

cards.title: Frenzied Flame Seal
cards.description: Formless sacred seal bestowed by the maiden of the Three Fingers. Enhances incantations of the frenzied flame.

cards.title: Frozen Needle
cards.description:
A razor-thin piercing blade of ice.
Forged by Iji, the Carian Royal Blacksmith.

cards.title: Full Moon Crossbow
cards.description: One-of-a-kind enchanted crossbow of exquisitely detailed craftsmanship. Made to celebrate the matrimonial union, and reconciliation, between the houses of the Erdtree and the Full Moon, Leyndell and Raya Lucaria. The two rings dance when reloading the weapon. Reveals true worth when used with holy-infused bolts.

cards.title: Gargoyle's Black Axe
cards.description:
Bronze greataxe wielded by Valiant Gargoyle, mended with blackened corpse wax.
Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Gargoyle's Black Blades
cards.description:
Bronze twinblade wielded by Valiant Gargoyle, mended with blackened corpse wax.
Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Gargoyle's Black Halberd
cards.description:
Bronze halberd wielded by Valiant Gargoyle, mended with blackened corpse wax.
Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Gargoyle's Blackblade
cards.description:
Bronze greatsword wielded by Valiant Gargoyle, mended with blackened corpse wax.
Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Gargoyle's Great Axe
cards.description: Bronze greataxe wielded by Valiant Gargoyle.

cards.title: Gargoyle's Greatsword
cards.description: Bronze greatsword wielded by Valiant Gargoyle.

cards.title: Gargoyle's Halberd
cards.description: Bronze halberd wielded by Valiant Gargoyle.

cards.title: Gargoyle's Twinblade
cards.description: Bronze twinblade wielded by Valiant Gargoyle.

cards.title: Gelmir Glintstone Staff
cards.description: Staff with a forked tip, embedded with red glintstones. Enhances lava sorceries.

cards.title: Ghiza's Wheel
cards.description: Great iron wheel lined with flesh-flaying blades. Device of torture used by Inquisitor Ghiza. As the wheel spins it causes severe pain and blood loss.

cards.title: Ghostflame Torch
cards.description: Metal torch that burns with cold ghostflame. Tool of the Fallen Hawks who prowl the underground rivers. When the band's last embers were used up in their long search, they began to burn the bones of their fellows, acquiring the cold ghostflame, but sealing their fate as dwellers of the underground for all eternity.

cards.title: Giant-Crusher
cards.description: A hammer made from a boulder, used in the War against the Giants. One of the heftiest weapons in the entire Lands Between. After the giants were quelled, and man turned against man in violence, this weapon was all but forgotten. Man has grown feeble in comparison to his forebears.

cards.title: Giant's Red Braid
cards.description: Hefty whip woven from the flame-red hair of a Fire Giant.

cards.title: Giant's Seal
cards.description: Sacred seal depicting the one-eyed god of the Fire Giants, adorned with braids of red hair.

cards.title: Gilded Greatshield
cards.description: Metal greatshield coated with gold. Carried by knights loyal to Godrick.

cards.title: Gilded Iron Shield
cards.description: Small metal roundshield. Heavier than a wooden shield, but boasts higher damage negation.

cards.title: Glaive
cards.description: Weapon comprised of a sharp blade affixed to a long grip. It is in fact a sickle repurposed to be a tool of war.

cards.title: Glintstone Kris
cards.description: Ritual blade once presented to Leyndell by the Academy of Raya Lucaria to celebrate their newfound peace. Though the weapon is embedded with precious glintstones and features Erdtree ornamentation, the undulating blade is symbolic of an ancient ritual.

cards.title: Glintstone Staff
cards.description: Staff with a glintstone embedded at the tip. A catalyst for casting sorceries.

cards.title: Godskin Peeler
cards.description: Unique twinblade wielded by Godskin Apostles characterized by its disturbing design. One end features a sickle for slicing attacks while the other boasts a winding spike for boring into flesh.

cards.title: Godskin Stitcher
cards.description: Elegant piercing sword with a celadon colored blade wielded by Godskin Nobles.

cards.title: Godslayer's Greatsword
cards.description: Sacred sword of the Dusk-Eyed Queen who controlled the Godskin Apostles before her defeat at the hands of Maliketh.

cards.title: Godslayer's Seal
cards.description: Sacred seal of the Godskin Apostles, inlaid with obsidian.

cards.title: Golden Arrow
cards.description: Carved arrows made in tandem with the Erdtree Bow. Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Golden Beast Crest Shield
cards.description: Shield of dull gold with a beast engraved as its crest. Lighter than most greatshields, and subsequently easier to wield.

cards.title: Golden Bolt
cards.description: Bolt blessed with an incantation of the Erdtree. Deals powerful holy damage.

cards.title: Golden Epitaph
cards.description: A sword made to commemorate the death of Godwyn the Golden, first of the demigods to die.

cards.title: Golden Great Arrow
cards.description: Carved greatarrows made together with the Erdtree Greatbow. Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Golden Greatshield
cards.description: Oval greatshield made of gold, carried by knights who protect the Royal Capital of Leyndell.

cards.title: Golden Halberd
cards.description:
Weighty halberd forged of gold. Wielded by the Order of Tree Sentinels, heavily equipped knights.
Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Golden Order Greatsword
cards.description:
Greatsword made of light, modeled after the Elden Ring itself. Forged by King Consort Radagon to proudly
symbolize the tenets of the Golden Order.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Golden Order Seal
cards.description: A formless sacred seal depicting the ceremonial observation of Order. Enhances Golden Order Fundamentalist incantations.

cards.title: Golem Greatbow
cards.description: Greatbow of black stone crafted by a civilization now gone to ruin. Weapon of the Guardian Golem.

cards.title: Golem's Great Arrow
cards.description: Greatarrow of black stone crafted by a civilization now gone to ruin. Used by the Guardian Golem.

cards.title: Golem's Halberd
cards.description: A great halberd of black stone crafted by a civilization now gone to ruin. Wielded by the Guardian Golem.

cards.title: Golem's Magic Arrow
cards.description: Greatarrow of black stone crafted by a civilization now gone to ruin. Imbued with its ancient magic.

cards.title: Grafted Blade Greatsword
cards.description:
The storied sword of Castle Morne. A revenger's weapon, it is burdened with oceans of anger and regret.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Grafted Dragon
cards.description: The embodiment of the power that still remained in the dragon's head that was grafted to Godrick's left arm.

cards.title: Grave Scythe
cards.description: Greatscythe comprised of a large blade affixed to a crooked stick. Weapon wielded by the aged grave keepers who tend the forgotten graveyards throughout the Lands Between.

cards.title: Gravel Stone Seal
cards.description: Sacred seal made from Gravel Stone thought to be an ancient dragon scale. Enhances Dragon Cult incantations of the Royal Capital.

cards.title: Great Arrow
cards.description: A greatarrow as large as a spear for use with greatbows. Used by archers of monstrous strength employed by a lord's army.

cards.title: Great Club
cards.description: An enormous club of hard wood. Wildly hammering foes with this striking weapon requires no dexterity; only brute force. While it may seem sacrilegious, this weapon is said to be a withered branch of the Erdtree. Imbued with holy power, this weapon will never snap.

cards.title: Great Épée
cards.description:
Large rapier featuring a thin, sharp blade.
Commonly used in life or death duels.

cards.title: Great Knife
cards.description: Large knife with a broad, curved blade.

cards.title: Great Mace
cards.description: Huge bludgeon with sharp protrusions. An enlarged version of its smaller cousin.

cards.title: Great Omenkiller Cleaver
cards.description: The blade of this huge, loathsome cleaver comprises a row of amputated Omen horns. Weapon of slaughter wielded by Omenkillers.

cards.title: Great Stars
cards.description: Huge bludgeon with three stars at the striking end. Though primarily a striking weapon, the stars' spikes cause blood loss.

cards.title: Great Turtle Shell
cards.description: Shield fashioned from a great turtle shell. The natural curve helps it contend with foes' attacks.

cards.title: Greataxe
cards.description: Greataxe akin to a huge lump of iron. Recognized as the weapon of choice of badland chieftains.

cards.title: Greatbow
cards.description: Enormous greatbow larger than any man. Can not be drawn with any ordinary level of strength, but the force of its shots is extraordinary.

cards.title: Greathorn Hammer
cards.description: Huge thick horn carved with tree ring-like markings adapted into a bludgeoning weapon. Wielded by ancestral follower warriors.

cards.title: Greatsword
cards.description:
A coarse iron lump of an ultra greatsword.
Mows down foes by utilizing its incredible weight.

cards.title: Grossmesser
cards.description:
Curved sword boasting a large blade.
This weapon is designed to make use of its weight in combination with its sharp cutting edge.

cards.title: Guardian's Swordspear
cards.description: Weapon comprising a long handle and broad blade sharpened from the hard wood of old trees.

cards.title: Halberd
cards.description: A long-handled polearm that combines the functions of both axe and spear.

cards.title: Haligbone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow with gold tincture tip

cards.title: Haligbone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Fletched bone arrow with gold tincture tip

cards.title: Haligbone Bolt
cards.description: Animal bone bolt with gold tincture tip

cards.title: Haligtree Crest Greatshield
cards.description: Metal greatshield depicting the Haligtree with unalloyed gold. Carried by knights who have vowed to serve Miquella's Haligtree. Possesses high holy damage negation. Yet now, with the Haligtree misshapen, this wondrous rendition is a fleeting fantasy.

cards.title: Halo Scythe
cards.description: War scythe of the Cleanrot Knights who fought alongside Malenia, Blade of Miquella.

cards.title: Hammer
cards.description: Hammer comprised of a large stone affixed to a metal handle. Originally a blacksmith's tool.

cards.title: Hand Axe
cards.description: Commonly known as a hatchet, this smaller variety of axe is an everyday work tool.

cards.title: Hand Ballista
cards.description: An unconventional ballistic device modelled on a weapon used to besiege castles. Only capable of firing greatbolts.

cards.title: Hand of Malenia
cards.description:
Blade built into Malenia's prosthetic arm.
Through consecration it is resistant to rot.

cards.title: Harp Bow
cards.description: Bow fashioned from a minstrel's harp. Sonorous tones still resound when firing arrows.

cards.title: Hawk Crest Wooden Shield
cards.description: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle.

cards.title: Heater Shield
cards.description: A medium-sized metal shield, comparatively easy to handle.

cards.title: Heavy Cleanrot Knight's Spear
cards.description:
Spear used by knights in service of Malenia,
the twin sister who possessed the Rune of Decay.
With its sharp tip, the weapon specializes in
running opponents through.

cards.title: Heavy Crossbow
cards.description: Heavy crossbow with iron limbs, increasing damage dealt.

cards.title: Heavy Dragon Halberd
cards.description:
Relatively large halberd with a striking point
modeled on a dragon.
A one-of-a-kind masterwork made by
a weaponsmith who was enamored with
dragons and their strength.

cards.title: Heavy Erdtree Greatshield
cards.description:
Shield used by Tree Sentinels.
Treated with gold, featuring a delicate design.

cards.title: Heavy Gargoyle's Black Axe
cards.description:
Greataxe wielded by the gargoyles
serving under Maliketh.

cards.title: Heavy Gargoyle's Black Halberd
cards.description:
Halberd wielded by the gargoyles
serving under Maliketh.

cards.title: Heavy Gargoyle's Blackblade
cards.description:
Greatsword wielded by the gargoyles
serving under Maliketh.

cards.title: Heavy Inseparable Sword
cards.description:
Sharp sword used by D, Knight of the Golden Order.
The blade was forged with a mix of silver and brass.

cards.title: Heavy Lava Whip
cards.description: Whip with a unique three-headed shape.

cards.title: Heavy Sword of Milos
cards.description:
Greatsword fashioned from the strong spine of
a dragon. The fine, serrated blade lacerates
its prey, causing severe hemorrhaging.

cards.title: Heavy Varré's Bouquet
cards.description: A steel mace resembling a bouquet of roses.

cards.title: Heavy Watchdog's Crosier
cards.description:
Great hammer wielded by golems
protecting the Undercapital Labyrinth.
Extraordinary strength is required
to wield something so heavy.

cards.title: Helphen's Steeple
cards.description: Greatsword patterned after the black steeple of the Helphen, the lampwood which guides the dead of the spirit world.

cards.title: Heretic's Hook
cards.description:
Scythe used both for collecting
and offering up the dead.
The blade itself seems to be
a tortured, maddened thing.

cards.title: Highland Axe
cards.description: Single-sided axe used by the warriors of the highlands.

cards.title: Holy Inferno Greatsword
cards.description:
Large katana used by Monks of the Giants' Flame.
The characteristic blade has the motif
of flickering flames.

cards.title: Hookclaws
cards.description: Weapon worn on the fist comprised of sharp parallel blades favored by those who lurk in the dark. Lacerations cause blood loss with great effect.

cards.title: Horn Bow
cards.description: Longbow made from animal horn. Wielded by the master hunters of the ancestral followers.

cards.title: Horse Crest Wooden Shield
cards.description: A tall, medium-sized wooden shield. Light for its size, and easy to handle.

cards.title: Hoslow's Petal Whip
cards.description:
Metal whip formed of razor-sharp chain-link blades that have the appearance of flower petals. This work of art is handed down through the generations of the illustrious House Hoslow.
High dexterity is required to wield this weapon, but it excels at inflicting devastating blood loss.
"The tale of House Hoslow is told in blood."

cards.title: Ice Crest Shield
cards.description: Small metal roundshield. Heavier than a wooden shield, but boasts higher damage negation.

cards.title: Icerind Hatchet
cards.description: A hatchet with a frost-coated blade. One of several gifts given by Castle Sol in the distant north.

cards.title: Icon Shield
cards.description: Greatshield painted with a divine scene; the recipience of a blessed tear from the Erdtree. An item that looks back fondly on the age of plenty.

cards.title: Inquisitor's Girandole
cards.description: Instrument of torture used on nobles behind the curtain at the Volcano Manor of Mt. Gelmir.

cards.title: Inseparable Sword
cards.description:
Sword forged by compounding silver and gold.
A sacred weapon to hunt Those Who Live in Death.
Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Inverted Hawk Heater Shield
cards.description: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield.

cards.title: Inverted Hawk Towershield
cards.description: An iron greatshield large enough to cover the entire body. Features an inverted hawk crest.

cards.title: Iron Ball
cards.description: Iron manifer of spherical shape. Big Boggart the blackguard's weapon of choice.

cards.title: Iron Cleaver
cards.description: Fairly large iron cleaver, commonly used by the maltreated Misbegotten.

cards.title: Iron Greatsword
cards.description:
Greatsword with a blade of unusually thick steel.
A coarse weapon to which polishing is a foreign concept.

cards.title: Iron Roundshield
cards.description: An ordinary small roundshield made of metal. Heavier than a wooden shield, but boasts higher damage negation.

cards.title: Iron Spear
cards.description:
Commonly used iron spear with no notable traits.
The blade is severely rusted.

cards.title: Ivory Sickle
cards.description:
Sickle fashioned from ivory.
Weapon carried by aged Albinaurics.

cards.title: Jar Cannon
cards.description: Jar cannon which uses explosives to fire greatbolts. Deals great damage but is slow to reload.

cards.title: Jawbone Axe
cards.description: Axe made from a herbivore's skull. Weapon of the ancestral followers who disdain metal.

cards.title: Jellyfish Shield
cards.description: The head of a spirit jellyfish, commonly found floating above sacred ground throughout the Lands Between, wielded without modification as a shield.

cards.title: Katar
cards.description: Imported dagger design with a rather unique handle. The blade can be swung about as the extension of one's fist.

cards.title: Kite Shield
cards.description: A standard medium-sized metal shield.

cards.title: Knight's Greatsword
cards.description: Greatsword bestowed upon skilled swordsmen in the demigods' service, and yet had no rank or title.

cards.title: Lance
cards.description: Considered a type of greatspear, this weapon has no blade, but instead features a long, conical body designed to pierce.

cards.title: Large Club
cards.description:
A thick, solid lump of wood.
Wielding this striking weapon requires no skill.

cards.title: Large Leather Shield
cards.description: A roundshield covered in leather. On the larger side for a medium-sized shield.

cards.title: Lazuli Glintstone Sword
cards.description:
A sword with a glintstone in its handguards. Wielded by scholars of the Lazuli Conspectus who seek to master Carian sorcery.
Deals magic damage.

cards.title: Light Crossbow
cards.description: Ranged weapon made from a bow fixed to a stock. Deals good damage and is simple to use, but requires reloading after firing.

cards.title: Lightning Bolt
cards.description: Bolt tipped with a shard of Gravel Stone. Deals powerful lightning damage.

cards.title: Lightning Greatbolt
cards.description: Greatbolt tipped with a clump of Gravel Stone shards.

cards.title: Lightningbone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow charged with lightning

cards.title: Lightningbone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Fletched animal bone arrow charged with lightning

cards.title: Lightningbone Bolt
cards.description: Animal bone bolt with lightning-imbued tip

cards.title: Lion Greatbow
cards.description: Greatbow of black iron wielded by General Radahn. Decorated with a lion mane motif.

cards.title: Longbow
cards.description: Longbow made to fire arrows over great distances. Compared to a shortbow, arrows fired reach further and deal more damage.

cards.title: Longhaft Axe
cards.description: Large iron axe with a long handle. Weapon of the maltreated Misbegotten.

cards.title: Longsword
cards.description: A straight sword with a double-edged blade.

cards.title: Lordsworn's Bolt
cards.description: Well-crafted bolt with an illustrious design, wielded by regulars of a lord's army.

cards.title: Lordsworn's Greatsword
cards.description:
Well-crafted straight sword with an illustrious
design, wielded by regulars of a lord's army.

cards.title: Lordsworn's Shield
cards.description:
Wooden tower shield. Lightweight for a greatshield and easy to handle.
Commonly used in the Shattering.

cards.title: Lordsworn's Straight Sword
cards.description:
Well-crafted straight sword with an illustrious
design, wielded by regulars of a lord's army.

cards.title: Loretta's War Sickle
cards.description: Intricately crafted silver war sickle wielded by Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree.

cards.title: Lucerne
cards.description: This polearm features a hard, sharpened beak-like spike attached to its head, designed to pierce armor.

cards.title: Lusat's Glintstone Staff
cards.description: Staff of the primeval glintstone sorcerer Lusat. Only those who have glimpsed what lies beyond the wisdom of stone may wield it.

cards.title: Mace
cards.description: An iron bludgeon with sharp protrusions.

cards.title: Magicbone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow with glintstone tincture tip

cards.title: Magicbone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Fletched bone arrow with glintstone tincture tip

cards.title: Magicbone Bolt
cards.description: Animal bone bolt with glintstone tincture tip

cards.title: Magma Blade
cards.description:
Curved sword with a blade fashioned from the lava of Mt. Gelmir.
An armament of the man-serpents, impossible for a human to have made.

cards.title: Magma Whip Candlestick
cards.description: This ritual implement is a three pronged candlestick with solid flames formed of the magma of Mt. Gelmir.

cards.title: Magma Wyrm's Scalesword
cards.description: Curved greatsword wielded by Magma Wyrms. The shape resembles a dragon's jaw and is covered in hard scales.

cards.title: Maliketh's Black Blade
cards.description: Maliketh's black blade which once harbored the power of the Rune of Death. A sad shadow of its former glory.

cards.title: Man-Serpent's Shield
cards.description: Small copper dome-shaped roundshield carried by the man-serpents of Mt. Gelmir.

cards.title: Manor Towershield
cards.description: An iron greatshield large enough to cover the entire body. Depicts the Roundtable Hold, gathering place of champions.

cards.title: Mantis Blade
cards.description: A curved sword with a blade at both ends wielded by the Cemetery Shades, the insect-ridden grave keepers.

cards.title: Marais Executioner's Sword
cards.description:
Storied sword of House Marais, the family of executioners who presided over the Shaded Castle.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Marika's Hammer
cards.description: Stone hammer made in the lands of the Numen, outside the Lands Between. The tool with which Queen Marika shattered the Elden Ring and Radagon attempted to repair it.

cards.title: Marred Leather Shield
cards.description: Leather shield of Stormveil soldiers. Much like the castle, it is marred by mottling and thorns.

cards.title: Marred Wooden Shield
cards.description: Wooden shield of Stormveil soldiers. Much like the castle, it is marred by mottling and thorns.

cards.title: Meteor Bolt
cards.description: Enchanted work of craft made in tandem with the Full Moon Crossbow. The tip is embedded with glintstone.

cards.title: Meteoric Ore Blade
cards.description:
Katana forged from meteoric ore to dispatch lifeforms born of falling stars.
Deals magic damage.

cards.title: Meteorite Staff
cards.description: Staff embedded with a dark purple glintstone, said to be the fragment of a meteorite. Boasts high sorcery scaling and boosts gravity sorceries as well.

cards.title: Miquellan Knight's Sword
cards.description: Sword forged by servants of Miquella of the Haligtree, with a design modeled after those carried by Carian knights. Instead of glintstone however, amber from the Haligtree is embedded in the blade.

cards.title: Misbegotten Shortbow
cards.description: Shortbow wielded by Winged Misbegotten. Fine fur clings to it.

cards.title: Miséricorde
cards.description:
Dagger favored by military physicians in white.
The pointed blade is hard and sharp, making critical hits especially potent.

cards.title: Mohgwyn's Sacred Spear
cards.description: Trident of Mohg, Lord of Blood. A sacred spear that will come to symbolize his dynasty.

cards.title: Monk's Flameblade
cards.description:
Curved sword with a flickering flame motif.
Wielded by the Fire Monks who came from the Mountaintops of the Giants.

cards.title: Monk's Flamemace
cards.description: Warhammer made to resemble flickering flames. Signature weapon of the Fire Monks, who hail from the Mountaintops of the Giants.

cards.title: Moonveil
cards.description:
Katana forged of glintstone.
Masterpiece of a Sellian swordsmith.

cards.title: Morgott's Cursed Sword
cards.description: Warped blade of shifting hue used by Morgott, the Omen King.

cards.title: Morning Star
cards.description: Warhammer comprised of a globe attached to a handle. Though a bludgeon dealing strike damage, the appellative star is covered in spikes which cause blood loss.

cards.title: Nagakiba
cards.description:
Katana with a ferociously long blade.
Signature weapon of Yura, hunter of Bloody Fingers.

cards.title: Nightrider Flail
cards.description:
A flail with two additional bludgeoning heads.
Weapon of the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds.

cards.title: Nightrider Glaive
cards.description: A jet-black glaive with a blade as weighty as a bludgeon. Weapon of the Night's Cavalry who ride funeral steeds.

cards.title: Noble's Estoc
cards.description:
Estoc carried by wandering nobles.
Made to be easy to wield.

cards.title: Noble's Slender Sword
cards.description:
Narrow blade carried by wandering nobles.
Made to be easy to wield.

cards.title: Nox Flowing Hammer
cards.description: Mace shaped like a suspended metal droplet wielded by monks of the Eternal City.

cards.title: Nox Flowing Sword
cards.description: A grim weapon wielded by swordsmen of the Eternal City, this shotel has a blade as fine as a needle.

cards.title: Occult Marika's Hammer
cards.description:
Warhammer wielded by Radagon.
Forged in the age of gods, it harbors
colossal magic power.

cards.title: Omen Cleaver
cards.description: Heavy-bladed curved sword of colossal size awarded to Omen as a tool of war. This weapon is made to take advantage of brute strength.

cards.title: One-Eyed Shield
cards.description: Tricksome shield made from white stone depicting a malformed one-eyed god. The barrel of a firearm pokes through the open mouth.

cards.title: Onyx Lord's Greatsword
cards.description:
Greatsword forged from golden-hued meteoric ore.
The blade conceals gravity-manipulating magic.

cards.title: Ordovis's Greatsword
cards.description: Greatsword of Ordovis, one of the two honored as foremost among the Crucible Knights.

cards.title: Ornamental Straight Sword
cards.description:
Slender straight sword patterned after an antique ornament.
Superior swordsmen prefer to wield one in each hand.

cards.title: Parrying Dagger
cards.description:
A knife with curved handguards.
Designed to parry, turning foes' attacks against them.

cards.title: Partisan
cards.description: Spear with a wide tip.

cards.title: Perfumer's Bolt
cards.description: Bolt created with perfumer techniques. Used by nobles' guards and the like.

cards.title: Perfumer's Shield
cards.description: Golden shield used by the perfumers of Leyndell during military service.

cards.title: Pest's Glaive
cards.description:
Glaive made from a hard, sharpened shell. Wielded by the pests who emerged from the Swamp of Aeonia.
Slightly increases non-physical damage negation.

cards.title: Pickaxe
cards.description: Large pickaxe designed to crack thick bedrock. Tool of sturdy miners.

cards.title: Pike
cards.description: A longspear featuring an especially lengthy handle.

cards.title: Pillory Shield
cards.description: Pillory made to punish serious felons, used as a shield. Though made of good, sturdy wood, it is only a makeshift tool and performs as such.

cards.title: Poisonbone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow with poison-daubed tip

cards.title: Poisonbone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Fletched animal bone arrow with poison-daubed tip

cards.title: Poisonbone Bolt
cards.description: Animal bone bolt with poison-coated tip

cards.title: Prelate's Inferno Crozier
cards.description: Colossal hammer with the appearance of roiling flames. Weapon of the Prelates who lead the Fire Monks. Its heft represents the weight of their guardianship.

cards.title: Prince of Death's Staff
cards.description: Staff embedded with sullied amber, said to be a very part of the Prince of Death. Enhances death sorceries.

cards.title: Pulley Bow
cards.description: Longbow which utilizes a series of pulleys and springs. The complex mechanism, which required advanced mathematical and mechanical understanding to craft, was likely made by a certain genius who learned Golden Order fundamentalism.

cards.title: Pulley Crossbow
cards.description:
Crossbow made with pulleys and power springs. The complex mechanism, which required advanced mathematical and mechanical understanding to craft, was likely made by a certain genius who learned Golden Order fundamentalism.
One touch fires a volley of bolts. Be warned; large stores of bolts can be quickly spent.

cards.title: Radahn's Spear
cards.description: Greatarrows used by General Radahn during the festival of combat. These are in fact the many spears with which he was stabbed by the Cleanrot Knights.

cards.title: Rainbow Stone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow tipped with Rainbow Stone shard

cards.title: Rainbow Stone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Arrow whittled from animal bones tipped with chips of Rainbow Stone. Colored light shines at the point of impact.

cards.title: Rapier
cards.description:
A piercing sword with a sharp, slender blade.
In addition to this weapon's thrusting attack prowess, it also boasts the ability to be used while guarding with a shield.

cards.title: Raptor Talons
cards.description: Claw comprised of two sharp, thin blades. Wielded by the assassins of ravenmount, this weapon allows them to imitate the attacks of Deathbirds.

cards.title: Red Branch Shortbow
cards.description: Shortbow of polished red wood. Fashioned by a master craftsman and wielded by pages.

cards.title: Red Crest Heater Shield
cards.description: A medium-sized metal shield. Easier to handle than a kite shield.

cards.title: Red Thorn Roundshield
cards.description: A small, wooden roundshield. It is light and easy to handle, but cannot offer the damage negation of a metal shield.

cards.title: Redmane Greatshield
cards.description: Greatshield shaped like a fang, featuring the crest of red-maned lion. Carried by the Redmane Knights who fought alongside Radahn.

cards.title: Reduvia
cards.description:
Jagged dagger with a distinctive curved blade.
Used by the noble servants of the Lord of Blood.

cards.title: Regalia of Eochaid
cards.description:
Treasured sword of Eochaid, a lesser, long-vanished domain.
The copper coloration is not to be confused for rust, but is a conduit for its wielder to move it by their will alone.

cards.title: Rickety Shield
cards.description: A creaky old wooden shield, circular in shape. Roughly reinforced with vines.

cards.title: Rift Shield
cards.description: Small metal roundshield depicting a sinister rift.

cards.title: Ringed Finger
cards.description: Bludgeon made of an enormous finger sheathed in several heavy rings. Thought to have been cut from an ancestor of the Fingercreeper.

cards.title: Ripple Blade
cards.description: Unique weapon wielded by young Albinaurics, this sword is modelled after the ripples that are thought to be the origin of their species.

cards.title: Ripple Crescent Halberd
cards.description: Weapon wielded by young Albinaurics.

cards.title: Rivers of Blood
cards.description:
Weapon of Okina, swordsman from the Land of Reeds.
A cursed weapon that has felled countless men.

cards.title: Riveted Wooden Shield
cards.description: Small wooden roundshield that has been reinforced with metal. It is light and easy to handle, but cannot offer the damage negation of a true metal shield.

cards.title: Rogier's Rapier
cards.description:
Piercing sword of superior quality, featuring intricate ornamentation.
Signature weapon of the sorcerer Rogier.

cards.title: Rosus' Axe
cards.description: Usher of Death, Rosus, who shows the path to the catacombs throughout the Lands Between, is depicted on this ritual axe.

cards.title: Rotbone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow with rot-coated tip

cards.title: Rotbone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Fletched bone arrow with rot-coated tip

cards.title: Rotbone Bolt
cards.description: Animal bone bolt with rot-coated tip

cards.title: Rotten Battle Hammer
cards.description: Large iron warhammer designed for gladiatorial combat, now festering with scarlet rot.

cards.title: Rotten Crystal Spear
cards.description: Spear fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human.

cards.title: Rotten Crystal Staff
cards.description: Staff fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human. It festers with scarlet rot.

cards.title: Rotten Crystal Sword
cards.description: Sword fashioned from pure crystal; a deed impossible for a human.

cards.title: Rotten Greataxe
cards.description: Greataxe designed for gladiatorial combat, now festering with scarlet rot.

cards.title: Rotten Staff
cards.description: Ceremonial staff depicting the Erdtree in its historic radiance. It festers with scarlet rot.

cards.title: Round Shield
cards.description: A wooden roundshield that has been reinforced with metal.

cards.title: Royal Greatsword
cards.description:
Greatsword decorated in royal Carian style.
Favored weapon of Blaidd the Half-Wolf.

cards.title: Royal Soldier Straight Sword
cards.description:
A straight sword with a wide blade.
Effective for slashing attacks.

cards.title: Ruins Greatsword
cards.description:
Originally rubble from a ruin which fell from the sky, this surviving fragment was honed into a weapon.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Rusted Anchor
cards.description: A rusty anchor wielded as a weapon. Each of its four flukes is thick and sharp, enabling piercing attacks.

cards.title: Sacred Relic Sword
cards.description: Sword wrought from the remains of a god who should have lived a life eternal.

cards.title: Sacrificial Axe
cards.description: Hatchet used in ancient sacrificial rite. A Deathbird is depicted as a malevolent deity.

cards.title: Scavenger's Curved Sword
cards.description:
Unique curved sword, notched like shark's teeth.
Weapon carried by corpse pillagers who prowl the sites of old battles.

cards.title: Scepter of the All-Knowing
cards.description: Scepter in the form of a hand grasping a pearl. Signature weapon of Sir Gideon Ofnir, the All-Knowing. The pearl stands for the world, the heavens, and an eye, representing the many forms of knowledge, never fully attainable. Even knowing that, the All-Knowing's hand grasps for it.

cards.title: Scimitar
cards.description:
A curved sword with a single-sided blade.
Delivers slashing attacks with its sharp blade, but is ineffective against thick armor and hides covered in tough scales.

cards.title: Scorpion Kite Shield
cards.description: A standard medium-sized metal shield. Highly reputed for its solid build and reliability.

cards.title: Scorpion's Stinger
cards.description: Dagger fashioned from a great scorpion's tail, glistening with scarlet rot.

cards.title: Scripture Wooden Shield
cards.description: A small, wooden roundshield. It is light and easy to handle, but cannot offer the damage negation of a metal shield.

cards.title: Scythe
cards.description: Large scythe featuring a long, slender blade. Designed to reap, this weapon is capable of rapidly inflicting blood loss while also slipping through an enemy's guard.

cards.title: Sentry's Torch
cards.description: Torch given to protectors of the Erdtree. Its flames are bestowed with a special incantation which allows the bearer to see assassins cloaked in veils. Furnished on behalf of the Erdtree and the Grace-Given Lord such that a Night of Black Knives will never come again.

cards.title: Serpent Arrow
cards.description: Arrow carved to resemble a flying snake. Used in tandem with the Serpent Bow.

cards.title: Serpent Bow
cards.description: Malformed bow in the shape of a pair of poisonous snakes. Imbues arrows with poison through pagan magic, revealing its true worth when used with poison-infused arrows.

cards.title: Serpent-God's Curved Sword
cards.description: Curved sword fashioned in the image of an ancient serpent deity and tool of a forgotten religion practiced on Mt. Gelmir.

cards.title: Serpent-Hunter
cards.description: Weapon that serves as both greatsword and spear. Thought to have been used to hunt an immortal great serpent in the distant past, it manifests a long blade of light when facing such a creature. When their master's heroic aspirations degenerated into mere greed, his men searched for a weapon with which they might halt their lord.

cards.title: Serpentbone Blade
cards.description: Sinister katana modeled after a serpent bone.

cards.title: Shamshir
cards.description:
Curved sword with a thin blade of ample length.
Light of weight despite its larger size, its slicing attacks come in rapid succession.

cards.title: Sharktooth Curved Sword
cards.description:
Unique curved sword, notched like a shark's tooth.
Stubborn bloodstains cling to the blade, which was
once used to cut the horns from countless Omen.

cards.title: Shattershard Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow tipped with crystal shard

cards.title: Shattershard Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Arrow whittled from animal bones tipped with a shard of crystal. Creates a resonating noise at the point of impact.

cards.title: Shield of the Guilty
cards.description: Shield made to venerate a maiden whose eyes were crushed by Briars of Sin before being reborn in these lands.

cards.title: Short Spear
cards.description: A exceedingly plain spear of modest weight.

cards.title: Short Sword
cards.description:
A short straight sword with a short blade.
In addition to its reliable standard damage, this weapon also boasts powerful piercing attacks.

cards.title: Shortbow
cards.description: Small bow made to fire arrows over great distances. Other than its ability to fire off arrows in rapid succession, it is also well-suited for use on horseback.

cards.title: Shotel
cards.description: Curved sword with a severely hooked blade. Its attacks can slip through an enemy's guard.

cards.title: Siluria's Tree
cards.description: Siluria's Tree, weapon of one of the two honored as foremost among the Crucible Knights.

cards.title: Silver Mirrorshield
cards.description: Shield of radiant silver, festooned with amber and carried by Loretta, Knight of the Haligtree.

cards.title: Sleepbone Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow with waterlily tincture tip

cards.title: Sleepbone Arrow (Fletched)
cards.description: Fletched animal bone arrow with waterlily tincture tip

cards.title: Sleepbone Bolt
cards.description: Animal bone bolt with waterlily tincture tip

cards.title: Smoldering Shield
cards.description: Small shield made upon Mt. Gelmir forged from uncooling lava.

cards.title: Soldier's Crossbow
cards.description: A crossbow of simple make, usable by anyone, but lacking in both power and accuracy.

cards.title: Spear
cards.description: Weapon comprised of a blade attached to a long haft.

cards.title: Spiked Caestus
cards.description: A caestus with the rivets replaced by blood loss-inducing spikes.

cards.title: Spiked Club
cards.description: A club with beast fangs wrapped around the striking end. The uneven spread of fangs causes blood loss.

cards.title: Spiked Palisade Shield
cards.description: A large wooden shield covered with spikes. Though relatively light, it lacks in damage negation.

cards.title: Spiked Spear
cards.description: Weapon comprised of a spiked cylinder attached to a long pole. Capable of dealing strike damage when swung. The spikes induce blood loss.

cards.title: Spiralhorn Shield
cards.description: Small shield of antlers arranged in an eddy-like pattern. If used to attack a foe, the shield's antlers inflict blood loss. Once given to a Tarnished warrior who cultivated close ties to the ancestral followers. Though the effect is only slight, it boosts immunity, robustness, and focus.

cards.title: Spiritflame Arrow
cards.description: Arrow set alight with ghostflame before firing. Deals magic damage while also afflicting foes with frost.

cards.title: St. Trina's Arrow
cards.description: Arrow carved to resemble a withered water lily. Afflicts targets with a powerful sleep effect.

cards.title: St. Trina's Torch
cards.description: Candlestand torch that burns with a light-purple flame. The carvings depict St. Trina, but in adult form, somewhat unnervingly.

cards.title: Staff of Loss
cards.description: Staff missing its glintstone. Wielded by sorcerers who believe that discovery comes through acts of asceticism.

cards.title: Staff of the Avatar
cards.description: Ceremonial staff depicting the Erdtree in its historic radiance. Wielded by the avatars who protect the Minor Erdtrees.

cards.title: Staff of the Guilty
cards.description: A heretical staff fashioned from a smoldering, withered sapling that turns the blood of sacrifices pierced by it into glintstone. Similar to hex magic.

cards.title: Star Fist
cards.description: Spherical iron manifer covered in spikes which induce blood loss.

cards.title: Starscourge Greatsword
cards.description:
Curved greatswords of black steel wielded by General Radahn.
A pair of weapons decorated with a lion mane motif.

cards.title: Steel-Wire Torch
cards.description: Torch wound with metal wire. The flame can illuminate dark locales, or be used to attack enemies.

cards.title: Stone Club
cards.description: Signature weapon of battlemages, hewn from hard glintstone. This club is much heavier than its size suggests, but has no magic power.

cards.title: Storm Arrow
cards.description: Animal bone arrow, gust knocks enemies away

cards.title: Stormhawk Axe
cards.description: Battle axe designed to resemble a hawk, with its wings comprising the blade. Signature weapon of warriors who strive to remain one with the storm, despite being so far from their place of birth.

cards.title: Stormwing Bone Arrow
cards.description: Bone arrow fletched with stormhawk feathers

cards.title: Sun Realm Shield
cards.description: Shield of honor depicting a city crowned by the sun. It has seen better days.

cards.title: Sword of Milos
cards.description: Sinister greatsword fashioned from a giant's backbone. The spines along each side of the blade have been tapered to a fine point and mete out wounds like a lopsided saw-blade.

cards.title: Sword of Night and Flame
cards.description:
Storied sword and treasure of Caria Manor.
One of the legendary armaments.

cards.title: Sword of St. Trina
cards.description:
Silver sword carried by clerics of St. Trina.
Inflicts sleep ailment upon foes.

cards.title: Thorned Whip
cards.description: Hefty whip covered in crimson thorns. Weapon of the Prelates who lead the Fire Monks. A device of fearsome religious encouragement, it is fashioned in the image of the briars of sin.

cards.title: Torch
cards.description:
This torch's tip is wrapped in oil-soaked rags and set on fire.
The flame can illuminate dark locales, or be used to attack enemies.

cards.title: Torchpole
cards.description: Torch fastened to a long pole. Lights up dark areas, but cannot be raised overhead.

cards.title: Treespear
cards.description:
Golden spear with tree-like design. Wielded by knights employed as palace guards in the Royal Capital of Leyndell.
Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Troll Knight's Sword
cards.description:
Greatsword embedded with a blue glintstone.
Weapon of the trolls in service to the royal family of Caria. Called into service when the Queen invoked an oath they swore, the trolls are treated as true knights of Caria, and fight arm in arm with their human comrades.

cards.title: Troll's Golden Sword
cards.description: Sword given to the giants who fought for the Erdtree during the War against the Giants long ago.

cards.title: Troll's Hammer
cards.description: Mining tool of stonedigger trolls used to crack bedrock.

cards.title: Twinbird Kite Shield
cards.description:
Shield featuring a vividly painted twinbird.
The twinbird is said to be the envoy of an outer god, and mother of the Deathbirds.

cards.title: Twinblade
cards.description:
A sword with blades on both sides of the hilt.
This weapon is difficult to wield and demands high dexterity.

cards.title: Twinned Knight Swords
cards.description: An attractive twinblade of fine make that prizes the chivalric way.

cards.title: Uchigatana
cards.description:
A katana with a long single-edged curved blade.
A unique weapon wielded by the samurai from the Land of Reeds.

cards.title: Unarmed
cards.description:
No armament equipped.
Bare fists will be used to attack.

cards.title: Urumi
cards.description: This weapon made of extremely thin, flexible blades of metal is wielded like a whip by Nightfolk warriors.

cards.title: Varré's Bouquet
cards.description: A steel mace resembling a charming bouquet of roses. Each petal has a sharpened edge, leaving the roses perpetually colored with blood.

cards.title: Venomous Fang
cards.description: One of the weapons designed for gladiatorial combat. Used by duelists who were exiled from the colosseum.

cards.title: Veteran's Prosthesis
cards.description: Bladed prosthetic leg enwreathed with the power of lightning, instead attached to the fist. Commander Niall, veteran of Castle Sol, offered this prosthesis in exchange for the lives of defeated knights held prisoner. He went on to lead these men as an army of no nation.

cards.title: Visage Shield
cards.description: Tricksome bronze shield depicting the face of a Fire Giant. Several tongues leap from its open mouth.

cards.title: Vulgar Militia Saw
cards.description: A weapon comprised of a saw blade attached to a long grip. Brandished by the vulgar militia, its serrated edge is very effective at inflicting blood loss. The saw is said to also be used to cut up bodies to feed the militia, but there are no firsthand witnesses to confirm the dire rumor.

cards.title: Vulgar Militia Shotel
cards.description: A hooked blade attached to a long handle. Wielded by the vulgar militia, its attacks can slip through an enemy's guard.

cards.title: Vyke's War Spear
cards.description: War spear singed and blistered by fingers, used by Vyke, Knight of the Roundtable Hold.

cards.title: Wakizashi
cards.description:
Short sword with a tempering pattern on the blade.
A weapon unique to warriors of the Land of Reeds.
Afflicts targets with blood loss.

cards.title: Warhawk's Talon
cards.description: Talon-swords are affixed to the legs of Stormveil's warhawks, but this one has been repurposed for human use.

cards.title: Warped Axe
cards.description: Oversized double-headed axe with a bizarre, almost melted appearance.

cards.title: Warpick
cards.description:
Warhammer with a hard protruding beak.
A pickaxe designed for combat, in essence.

cards.title: Watchdog's Greatsword
cards.description: Stone greatsword wielded by Erdtree Burial Watchdogs.

cards.title: Watchdog's Staff
cards.description: Large stone staff embedded with glintstone. Wielded by Erdtree Burial Watchdogs who protect catacombs.

cards.title: Weathered Straight Sword
cards.description:
Straight sword with a rather short but wide blade.
Simple to wield, it was known as the sword of the people.

cards.title: Whip
cards.description: A leather whip. Not originally used for combat, but as an instrument of pain.

cards.title: Wing of Astel
cards.description:
Sword fashioned from a delicate wing, suffused with the magic of the stars.
Strong attack unleashes a wave of enchanted light.

cards.title: Winged Greathorn
cards.description: A unique horn in which the power of ancestral spirits fiercely dwells, this large, wing-shaped specimen is wielded as a weapon of spirit worship.

cards.title: Winged Scythe
cards.description: Sacred scythe resembling a pair of white wings. Deals holy damage.

cards.title: Wooden Greatshield
cards.description: Wooden greatshield reinforced with a metal ornamentation.

cards.title: Zamor Curved Sword
cards.description: Weapon wielded by the knights of Zamor who earned great renown during the War against the Giants.

cards.title: Zweihander
cards.description:
Just about the largest sword a mere man is capable of swinging.
True to its name, it is designed to be wielded in both hands, but those of merely ordinary strength will still struggle to do so.

cards.title: Ansbach's Attire
cards.description: Attire of Sir Ansbach. The embroidered crest of the Pureblood Knights has now all but faded away.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ansbach's Attire (Altered)
cards.description: Attire of Sir Ansbach. Black cloth adorned with gold embroidery.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ansbach's Boots
cards.description: Boots of Sir Ansbach. Black leather adorned with gold embroidery.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ansbach's Manchettes
cards.description: Manchettes of Sir Ansbach. Black leather adorned with gold embroidery.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Armor of Night
cards.description:
Bottomless black chest armor, cool to the touch.
Flowing lines in the seeming shape of a fingerprint adorn the surface. Imprisons the wearer in utterly lightless dark.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Armor of Solitude
cards.description:
Steel chest armor of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol.
Part of a heavy armor set that covers the whole body in overlapping plates of steel, and bedecked with a black cloak.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Armor of Solitude (Altered)
cards.description:
Steel chest armor of the Knights of the Solitary Gaol.
Part of a heavy armor set that covers the whole body in overlapping plates of steel.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ascetic's Ankle Guards
cards.description: Ankle guards of the tower's ascetics which embody their commitment to an austere existence of strict self-control.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ascetic's Loincloth
cards.description: Attire of the tower's ascetics, embodying their commitment to an austere existence of strict self-control.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ascetic's Wrist Guards
cards.description: Wrist guards of the tower's ascetics which embody their commitment to an austere existence of strict self-control.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Black Knight Armor
cards.description: Armor worn by the Black Knights, servants of Messmer the Impaler.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Black Knight Gauntlets
cards.description: Gauntlets worn by the Black Knights, servants of Messmer the Impaler. Black iron ornamented with gold. A rotten odor stubbornly clings to it.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Black Knight Greaves
cards.description: Greaves worn by the Black Knights, servants of Messmer the Impaler. Black iron ornamented with gold. A rotten odor stubbornly clings to it.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Black Knight Helm
cards.description: Helm worn by the Black Knights, servants of Messmer the Impaler. Black iron ornamented with gold. A rotten odor stubbornly clings to it.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Braided Arm Wraps
cards.description: Ragged black cloth tied with braided cord. Attire of a vengeance-seeking hornsent.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Braided Cord Robe
cards.description: Ragged black cloth overlaid with braided cord. Attire of a vengeance-seeking hornsent.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Caterpillar Mask
cards.description: Grotesque mask constructed from countless solidified caterpillars. A ritual implement of the greater potentates of Bonny Village.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Circlet of Light
cards.description: The circlet of light which adorned Miquella's head as he returned in divine aspect. It has begun to fade into nothingness.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Common Soldier Cloth Armor
cards.description: Cloth armor of the rank-and-file soldiers of Messmer's army.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Common Soldier Gauntlets
cards.description: Gauntlets of the rank-and-file soldiers of Messmer's army.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Common Soldier Greaves
cards.description: Greaves of the rank-and-file soldiers of Messmer's army.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Common Soldier Helm
cards.description: Helm of the rank-and-file soldiers of Messmer's army.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Crucible Hammer-Helm
cards.description: Helm worn by Devonia, longest-serving of the Crucible Knights.

cards.title: Ghostflame Dragon
cards.description: Metal torch that burns with cold ghostflame. Tool of the Fallen Hawks who prowl the underground rivers. When the band's last embers were used up in their long search, they began to burn the bones of their fellows, acquiring the cold ghostflame, but sealing their fate as dwellers of the underground for all eternity.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Golden Hippopotamus
cards.description: A sword made to commemorate the death of Godwyn the Golden, first of the demigods to die.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Grand Altar of Dragon Communion
cards.description: This Ash of War grants an armament the Magic affinity and the following skill:
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Greater Potentate
cards.description:
A record of crafting techniques of the greater potentate who roamed lands near and far.
Haunted by the grotesque practice of his village of birth, he stuffed great pots with all manner of things.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Hornsent
cards.description:
My brood is no more.

No one comes to visit.

Not Lady Leda. Not Father Dane. Not Sir Ansbach.

Not Freyja. Not Thiollier. Not the hornsent.

Where have they all gone?
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

connections.linkedTitle: Nine Malic Moulds/Cemetery of Uniforms and Liveries

cards.title: Hornsent Grandam
cards.description:
My brood is no more.

No one comes to visit.

Not Lady Leda. Not Father Dane. Not Sir Ansbach.

Not Freyja. Not Thiollier. Not the hornsent.

Where have they all gone?
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Igon
cards.description:
Weapon of Igon, the broken drake warrior.
A greatbow fashioned from two dragon bones bound with coarse rope.
Covered in gashes left by claws.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Jagged Peak Drake
cards.description:
Ahh, drake warrior, dear friend.

Grant me this one wish.

Take this finger. My finger.

Scale the jagged peak. Face Bayle the Dread. And when you do...

Summon me. Summon my soul.

My limbs are limbs no more. My heart is twice-over filled with fear.

But a drake warrior I remain.

And my soul yet lies on the mountain.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Jori, Elder Inquisitor
cards.description:
Greatstaff of Jori, elder inquisitor.
The tip bristles with golden barbs symbolic of the inquisition's torture, allowing one to wield the staff as a greatspear.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Knight of the Solitary Gaol
cards.description:
Straight sword embedded with a blue glintstone.
Weapon of knights sworn to Carian royalty.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Lamenter
cards.description: Transforms wearer into a lamenter and causes head to swell in size
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Messmer the Impaler
cards.description:
Weapon used by the soldiers who serve Messmer the Impaler.
A steel axe, worn from use.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Metyr, Mother of Fingers
cards.description:
Well. We don't often receive visitors.

I am Ymir. Welcome, to Manus Metyr.

It is a pleasure to have you.

In lands so forsaken as these, chance encounters are precious indeed.

Seeing that we have convened here on this day,

allow me to mark the occasion with a modest offering.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Midra, Lord of Frenzied Flame
cards.description: Summons Lord of Frenzied Flame's head to spew frenzied flame
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Moonrithyll, Carian Knight
cards.description:
Greatsword embedded with a blue glintstone.
The favored weapon of the steadfast Carian knight, Moonrithyll.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Moore
cards.description: Offer to Twin Maiden Husks for new item access
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Needle Knight Leda
cards.description:
A razor-thin piercing blade of ice.
Forged by Iji, the Carian Royal Blacksmith.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

connections.linkedTitle: Nine Malic Moulds/Cemetery of Uniforms and Liveries

cards.title: Promised Consort Radahn
cards.description:
Sister... Where did you go?

You promised me. When we turned 14, we'd go to see the stars...

I've been waiting ever so long. Forever and ever, it seems.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Pureblood Knight Ansbach
cards.description: Audience with Mohg will be granted, one day
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Putrescent Knight
cards.description:
Weapon wielded by the Putrescent Knight.
A great cleaver of hardened putrescence affixed to an arch fashioned from human bones.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Radahn, Consort of Miquella
cards.description:
I am Radahn.

Born of red-maned Radagon, and Rennala of the Full Moon.

A lion bred for battle.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Rakshasa
cards.description: A great katana with the tempering pattern of its blade forever stained red with blood. Weapon of Rakshasa, who cuts down and devours.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Ralva the Great Red Bear
cards.description: The pelt of Ralva the Great Red Bear, worn upon the head without modification.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Red Bear
cards.description: Claw of a great red bear wielded without modification by Red Bear, whose name is lost to madness.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Redmane Freyja
cards.description: Greatshield shaped like a fang, featuring the crest of red-maned lion. Carried by the Redmane Knights who fought alongside Radahn.

cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Romina, Saint of the Bud
cards.description:
Weapon of Romina, Saint of the Bud.
A scarlet glaive with a dangling bud-like blade.
Attacks cause buildup of rot.
Once, in the crumbling, burning church, Romina held the bud in speechless silence.
That bud would become her blade.
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Rugalea the Great Red Bear
cards.description: Channels great red bear to emit a furious roar
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Sanguine Noble Nataan
cards.description: Hood of dyed black cloth featuring gold embroidery
cards.section: Elden Ring - Shadow of the Erdtree

cards.title: Scadutree Avatar

Examine using ?keyicon@31?

cards.title: Two-Headed Turtle Talisman
cards.description: A talisman in the shape of a two headed green turtle. Greatly raises stamina recovery speed. Turtles are known as a nutritious ingredient, symbolic of inexhaustible power. Two headed turtles are a favorite subject in the land of the tower, due to the spiral shape of their intertwined necks. Homeopathic magic: Two heads = double the 'inexhaustible power' that turtles represent. The same virility/stamina magic as the single headed talisman, but doubled.

cards.description: Offer to Twin Maiden Husks for new item access
